title: Position: Let's Develop Data Probes to Fundamentally Understand How Data Affects LLM Performance
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Position Paper Track
summary: Data is fundamental to large language models (LLMs). However, understanding of what makes certain data useful for different stages of an LLM workflow, including training, tuning, alignment, in-context learning, etc., and why, remains an open question. Current approaches rely heavily on extensive experimentation with large public datasets to obtain empirical heuristics for data filtering and dataset construction. These approaches are compute intensive and lack a principled way of understanding the essence of how specific data characteristics drive LLM behavior. In this position paper, we advocate for the need of developing systematic methodologies for generating synthetic sequences from appropriately defined random processes, with the goal that these sequences can reveal useful characteristics when they are used in one or multiple stages of the LLM workflow. We refer to such sequences as data probes. By observing LLM behavior on data probes, researchers can systematically conduct studies on how data characteristics influence model performance, generalization, and robustness. The probing sequences exhibit statistical properties that can be viewed using theoretical concepts, such as typical sets, which are generalized to describe the behaviors of LLMs. This data-probe approach provides a pathway for uncovering foundational insights into the role of data in LLM training and inference, beyond empirical heuristics.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了"数据探针"(data probes)的概念，通过从适当定义的随机过程生成合成序列来系统研究数据特征如何影响LLM行为，为理解数据在LLM训练和推理中的作用提供原则性方法。
AI.motivation: 当前对数据的理解不足：为何某些数据在LLM的不同阶段（训练、调优、对齐、上下文学习等）有用，以及理解数据驱动模型行为的本质。当前方法依赖大量实验和启发式过滤，缺乏系统性原则。现有的数据过滤和数据集构建方法计算密集，且缺乏理解数据特征如何驱动LLM行为的理论框架。
AI.method: 提出数据探针方法：1)定义适当的随机过程；2)从这些过程中生成合成序列（数据探针）；3)通过观察LLM在这些探针上的行为来系统研究数据特征如何影响模型性能、泛化和鲁棒性。这些序列具有统计性质，可以用典型集等理论概念来描述，这些概念被推广以描述LLM的行为。
AI.result: 该方法提供了一个途径来揭示数据在LLM训练和推理中作用的基础性洞察，超越现有的经验性启发式方法。通过系统性地使用数据探针，研究者可以更有效地理解和优化数据选择，而不是依赖于大规模的试错实验。
AI.conclusion: 数据探针方法是理解和优化LLM数据的有前景的新范式，通过使用具有可控统计特性的合成序列来系统研究数据特征的影响，这为未来的LLM数据工程提供了理论基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about studying data characteristics in LLM (Large Language Model) training using synthetic data probes. It belongs to the NLP/ML research domain, NOT Computer Graphics. The research profile specifically focuses on Computer Graphics areas: diffusion-based video generation, 3D human motion generation, VLM for video quality assessment, and cross-modal learning for visual content. There is no overlap - this paper doesn't address any of the stated pain points about video generation, motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, or temporal consistency in synthesized content. It's purely about understanding how data affects LLM behavior in natural language processing tasks.

title: Operationalizing Document AI: A Microservice Architecture for OCR and LLM Pipelines in Production
summary: Academic research tends to focus on new models for document understanding creating a wide gap in the literature between model definition and running models at production scale. To close that gap, we present a microservice architecture that encapsulates pipelines of multiple models for classification, optical character recognition (OCR), and large language model structured field extraction as well as our experience running this pipeline on thousands of multi-page documents per hour. We describe our primary design decisions, including a hybrid classification, separation of GPU-bound inference from CPU-bound orchestration, use of asynchronous processing for the many IO-bound operations in the pipeline, and an independent, horizontal scaling strategy. Using batch profiling, we identified two surprising qualitative findings that shape production deployments: OCR, not language-model parsing, dominates end-to-end latency, and the system saturates at a concurrency determined by shared GPU-inference capacity rather than worker count. Our goal is to provide practitioners with concrete architectural patterns for building document understanding systems that work beyond the benchmark; effectively operationalizing models in production.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种微服务架构，用于在生产环境中运行文档理解流水线（包括分类、OCR和大语言模型结构化字段提取），可在数千份多页文档/小时的规模下运行，并揭示了OCR而非语言模型解析主导端到端延迟这一关键发现。
AI.motivation: 学术研究通常关注新模型的定义，但在生产规模上运行模型存在明显差距。本文旨在弥合这一差距，为从业者提供可在生产环境中有效运行的文档理解系统架构模式。
AI.method: 采用微服务架构设计，包含混合分类策略、GPU绑定推理与CPU绑定编排的分离、异步处理IO密集型操作、独立水平扩展策略，并通过批处理分析进行性能评估。
AI.result: 两个出人意料的定性发现：1) OCR而非语言模型解析主导端到端延迟；2) 系统在由共享GPU推理容量而非worker数量决定的并发量下饱和。测试规模达数千份多页文档/小时。
AI.conclusion: 本文为从业者提供了构建超越基准的文档理解系统的具体架构模式，强调了关注OCR优化和GPU推理容量管理的重要性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Document AI and OCR systems for processing text documents, which is completely orthogonal to Computer Graphics. The research profile focuses onVideo Generation, 3D Human Motion Generation, and using VLMs for quality assessment - all within computer graphics. While both papers involve "models" and "pipelines," the application domain is entirely different: document processing vs. generative video/3D motion synthesis. There is no overlap in methods or goals.

title: Evaluating the Utility of Personal Health Records in Personalized Health AI
summary: Patient-managed Personal Health Records (PHRs) promises to empower patients to better understand their health; but information in the record is complex, potentially hindering insights. In this study, we assess the potential of large language models (LLMs, Gemini 3.0 Flash) to provide helpful answers to user health queries, when provided clinical data from PHRs as context. A total of 2,257 user queries were drawn from 3 different distributions to represent patient questions: shorter web search queries, longer questions derived from templates of chatbot conversations, and questions patients asked to their healthcare team (patient calls). Queries were matched with de-identified PHRs (from a pool of 1,945). Gemini responses were generated (1) without PHR context; (2) with a basic summary of demographics, conditions, and medications; (3) with full, extensive clinical notes. For evaluation, we leveraged an existing rating framework (SHARP), and developed a new framework for specific error modes when interpreting PHRs. Evaluation was performed using autoraters for the full set, and with clinician ratings for a subset (n=95), with both sets of raters knowing the full PHR context. We see significant improvements in the helpfulness of answers to all question types with PHR data (p < 0.001, paired t-test). We also observe potential gains in safety, accuracy, relevance and personalization of answers. Our PHR evaluation framework further identifies gaps in LLM understanding of particular aspects of complex PHRs, such as temporal disorientation, and rare but meaningful confabulations. These results suggest potential for PHR data to help people with a wide range of user needs; and provide a framework for monitoring for gaps in LLM answers based on PHR context. This study motivates further work to assess and realize potential benefits to users from understanding their health records.

AI.tldr: 研究评估了大型语言模型（LLM，Gemini 3.0 Flash）在提供患者健康查询回答方面的潜力，使用个人健康记录（PHR）作为临床背景。研究发现，添加PHR数据显著提高了答案的帮助性、准确性、个性化和安全性。
AI.motivation: 患者管理的个人健康记录虽然有望赋权患者更好地理解自身健康，但记录中的信息复杂，可能阻碍患者获取有价值的见解。需要探索LLM是否能帮助患者理解这些复杂的健康数据。
AI.method: 研究使用来自3种不同分布的2257个患者查询，以及1945份去标识化PHR。测试了3种条件：(1)无PHR背景；(2)基本人口统计、状况和药物摘要；(3)完整临床笔记。采用SHARP评分框架和新开发的PHR特定错误模式评估框架，由自动评分员进行全面评分，临床评分员对子集(n=95)进行评分。
AI.result: 添加PHR数据后，各类型问题的答案帮助性均显著提高(p<0.001，配对t检验)。同时观察到答案在安全性、准确性、相关性和个性化方面的潜在提升。评估框架识别出LLM理解复杂PHRs时的差距，如时间定向障碍和罕见的虚构性错误。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明，PHR数据有潜力帮助满足广泛的用户需求，并提供了基于PHR背景监测LLM答案差距的框架。这项研究推动了进一步工作的发展，以评估和实现让用户理解其健康记录的潜在益处。

relevance_reason: This paper is about healthcare/medical AI - specifically using LLMs to answer patient health queries using Personal Health Records. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics, video generation, 3D human motion generation, diffusion-based video models, VLM for video quality assessment, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile. The application domain is completely different (healthcare vs computer graphics).

title: Learn-by-Wire Training Control Governance: Bounded Autonomous Training Under Stress for Stability and Efficiency
summary:
Modern language-model training is increasingly exposed to instability, degraded runs, and wasted compute, especially under aggressive learning-rate, scale, and runtime-stress conditions. This paper introduces Learn-by-Wire Guard (LBW-Guard), a bounded autonomous training-control governance layer that operates above AdamW. Rather than replacing the optimizer update rule, LBW-Guard observes training telemetry, interprets instability-sensitive regimes, and applies bounded control to optimizer execution while preserving fixed training objectives.
  We evaluate LBW-Guard in a Qwen2.5-centered stress-and-robustness suite using WikiText-103, with Qwen2.5-7B as the empirical anchor, model-size comparisons against Qwen2.5-3B and Qwen2.5-14B, learning-rate stress tests, gradient-clipping baselines, and a no-LoRA TinyLlama-1B full-parameter sanity check. In the 7B reference setting, LBW-Guard reduces final perplexity from 13.21 to 10.74, an 18.7% improvement, while reducing end-to-end time from 392.54s to 357.02s, a 1.10x speedup. Under stronger learning-rate stress, AdamW degrades to 1885.24 final perplexity at LR=3e-3 and 659.76 at LR=1e-3, whereas LBW-Guard remains trainable at 11.57 and 10.33, respectively. Gradient-clipping baselines do not reproduce this effect.
  These results support a scoped systems conclusion that stability-sensitive LLM training can benefit from a governance plane above the optimizer. LBW-Guard provides evidence that bounded runtime control can preserve productive compute under stress while remaining distinct from optimizer replacement and local gradient suppression.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LBW-Guard，一种基于AdamW之上的训练治理层，通过监控训练遥测数据并应用有界控制来应对大规模语言模型训练中的不稳定性问题。实验表明该方法可显著提升训练稳定性和效率，在高学习率压力条件下效果尤为突出。
AI.motivation: 现代语言模型训练日益面临不稳定性、退化运行和计算浪费的问题，特别是在激进的学习率、规模和运行时压力条件下。现有方法缺乏有效的训练过程监控与干预机制。
AI.method: 提出LBW-Guard（Learn-by-Wire Guard），一个运行在AdamW之上的有界自主训练控制治理层。该方法不替代优化器更新规则，而是观察训练遥测数据，识别不稳定敏感阶段，并对优化器执行应用有界控制，同时保持固定训练目标。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-7B上，LBW-Guard将最终困惑度从13.21降至10.74（提升18.7%），训练时间从392.54s降至357.02s（加速1.10x）。在学习率压力测试中，AdamW在LR=3e-3和1e-3下分别退化至1885.24和659.76困惑度，而LBW-Guard仅降至11.57和10.33。梯度剪裁基线无法复现此效果。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明：1）不稳定敏感的LLM训练可从优化器之上的治理平面受益；2）有界运行时控制可在压力下保持生产力计算；3）该方法不同于优化器替换和局部梯度抑制，属于系统级的训练稳定化方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about training governance for large language models (LLMs) using AdamW optimizer modifications. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, video generation, 3D human motion generation, or visual quality assessment. The application domain is completely mismatched - LLM training stability is in the machine learning/AI foundations field, not computer graphics. The methods (training telemetry monitoring, bounded control) are unrelated to diffusion-based video generation, VLM quality assessment, or motion synthesis.

title: MotionMERGE: A Multi-granular Framework for Human Motion Editing, Reasoning, Generation, and Explanation
summary: Recent motion-language models unify tasks like comprehension and generation but operate at a coarse granularity, lacking fine-grained understanding and nuanced control over body parts needed for animation or interaction. This stems from fundamental issues in both the model and the data, in which the model can't focus on motion's localized pattern, and the training data lacks fine-grained supervision. To tackle this, we propose MotionMERGE, a unified framework that bridges the granularity gap. First, we pioneer the study of fine-grained languageguided motion control, including detailed understanding and localized editing, by explicitly modeling motion at part and temporal levels within a single LLM, thereby endowing the model with robust priors for precise control. Second, we design ReasoningAware Granularity-Synergy pre-training, a novel strategy that employs joint supervision for cross-granularity alignment, temporal grounding, localized alignment, motion coherency, and motion-grounded chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning. This equips the model with fine-grained motion-language alignment, crossgranularity synergy, and explicit reasoning ability. Third, we curate MotionFineEdit, a large-scale dataset (837K atomic + 144K complex triplets) with the first fine-grained spatio-temporal corrective instructions and motion-grounded CoT annotations, establishing a new benchmark for fine-grained text-driven motion editing and motion-grounded reasoning. Extensive experiments demonstrate the capability of MotionMERGE for more precise motion generation, understanding, and editing, and compelling zero-shot generalization to other complex motion tasks. This work represents a significant step toward models that interact with motion in finer granularity and human-like reasoning.

AI.tldr: MotionMERGE是一个统一的细粒度语言引导运动控制框架，通过在单一LLM中显式建模身体部位和时间级别的运动，并设计Reasoning-Aware Granularity-Synergy预训练策略，结合精心构建的MotionFineEdit数据集，实现更精确的运动生成、理解和编辑能力。
AI.motivation: 现有运动-语言模型操作粒度粗糙，缺乏对身体部位的细粒度理解和精细控制能力。问题的根源在于模型无法聚焦于运动的局部模式，且训练数据缺乏细粒度监督信号。
AI.method: 提出三大创新：1）细粒度语言引导运动控制研究，在单一LLM中显式建模部位级和时间级运动；2）Reasoning-Aware Granularity-Synergy预训练策略，采用跨粒度对齐、时间定位、局部对齐、运动连贯性和运动grounded CoT推理的联合监督；3）构建MotionFineEdit大规模数据集（837K原子+144K复杂三元组），包含首个细粒度时空修正指令和运动grounded CoT标注。
AI.result: 实验表明MotionMERGE具备更精确的运动生成、理解和编辑能力，并能够零样本泛化到其他复杂运动任务。
AI.conclusion: 该工作代表了向更细粒度和类人推理方式与运动交互迈出的重要一步。

relevance_reason: This paper directly addresses "3D Human Motion Generation Models" from the methods list and involves bridging the domain gap between 2D (language) and 3D (motion) - which aligns with pain point #3. However, it uses LLM-based approach rather than diffusion-based video generation models mentioned in the profile. The main focus is on motion editing/generation via language, which is somewhat related but the method (LLM) differs significantly from the diffusion-based approach the researcher appears to be working with. Score reflects moderate relevance due to shared interest in 3D human motion generation but different core methodology.

title: Harnessing Self-Supervised Features for Art Classification
summary: Classifying artworks presents a significant challenge due to the complex interplay of fine-grained details and abstract features that condition the style or genre of an artwork. This paper presents a systematic investigation of the effectiveness of supervised and self-supervised backbones as feature extractors for both artwork classification and retrieval, with a particular focus on paintings. We conduct an extensive experimental evaluation using the DINO family and CLIP models, assessing multiple classification strategies and feature representations. Our results demonstrate that employing a self-supervised backbone leads to consistent improvements in artwork classification performance. Moreover, our work provides insights into the applicability of classification and retrieval modules in real-world applications, such as virtual reality (VR) applications that support museum navigation.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究艺术作品分类任务，比较监督和自监督 backbone 作为特征提取器的效果，重点评估 DINO 和 CLIP 模型在绘画分类和检索任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 艺术作品分类面临复杂挑战，需要兼顾细粒度细节和抽象风格特征的平衡。自监督学习方法可能在学习泛化特征表示方面具有优势。
AI.method: 使用 DINO 系列模型和 CLIP 模型作为特征提取器，进行广泛的实验评估，比较多种分类策略和特征表示方法。
AI.result: 使用自监督 backbone 可以显著提升艺术作品分类性能，同时为 VR 应用等实际场景提供分类和检索模块的可行性见解。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习方法在艺术作品分类任务中优于监督学习方法，具有一致的性能提升，为博物馆导航等实际应用提供了技术基础。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses art/painting classification (static images), which is a fundamentally different application domain from the research profile focused on video generation, 3D human motion synthesis, and VLM-based quality control for generated videos. While both use similar feature extraction methods (DINO, CLIP), the application areas are completely different - one deals with static art classification while the other deals with temporal video/motion synthesis and quality assessment. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points about bridging 2D video priors to 3D motion, ensuring temporal consistency, or quality screening of generated video content.

title: STAR-PólyaMath: Multi-Agent Reasoning under Persistent Meta-Strategic Supervision
summary: Frontier AI models and multi-agent systems have led to significant improvements in mathematical reasoning. However, for problems requiring extended, long-horizon reasoning, existing systems continue to suffer from fundamental reliability issues: hallucination accumulation, memory fragmentation, and imbalanced reasoning-tool trade-offs. In this paper, we introduce STAR-PólyaMath, a multi-agent framework that systematically addresses these challenges through meta-level supervision and structured Reasoner-Verifier interaction. STAR-PólyaMath is structured as an orchestrated state machine with nested challenge-step-replan loops, governed by a reasoning-free Python orchestrator that separates control from inference and bounds error propagation through trace-back and re-planning. Our key innovation is a persistent Meta-Strategist that maintains cross-attempt memory and exercises meta-level control by issuing high-level strategic guidance or mandatory directives, so the system can escape unproductive loops rather than stagnate or over-rely on tools. STAR-PólyaMath achieves state-of-the-art results on all eight top-tier competition benchmarks: AIME 2025-2026, MathArena Apex Shortlist, MathArena Apex 2025, Putnam 2025, IMO 2025, HMMT February 2026, and USAMO 2026. It obtains perfect scores on AIMEs, Putnam, and HMMT, and shows its largest margin on Apex 2025, scoring 93.75% compared with 80.21% by the strongest baseline GPT-5.5. Ablation studies show that the gains arise from the framework's orchestration rather than from model-level diversity since removing key components or substituting in mixed backbones consistently weakens performance. Code is available at https://github.com/Julius-Woo/STAR-PolyaMath.

title: Artifact-Bench: Evaluating MLLMs on Detecting and Assessing the Artifacts of AI-Generated Videos
summary: Recent video generative models have greatly improved the realism of AI-generated videos, yet their outputs still exhibit artifacts such as temporal inconsistencies, structural distortions, and semantic incoherence. While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) show strong visual understanding capabilities, their ability to perceive and reason about such artifacts remains unclear. Existing benchmarks often lack systematic evaluation of artifact-aware perception and fine-grained diagnostic reasoning, especially across diverse AI-generated video domains beyond photorealistic content. To address this gap, we introduce Artifact-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating MLLMs on AI-generated video artifact detection and analysis. We first establish a three-level hierarchical taxonomy of realism artifacts, covering photorealistic, animated, and CG-style videos. Based on this taxonomy, Artifact-Bench defines three complementary tasks: real vs. AI-generated video classification, pairwise realism comparison, and fine-grained artifact identification. Experiments on 19 leading MLLMs reveal substantial limitations in artifact perception and reasoning, with many models approaching random or even below-random performance in challenging settings. We further observe significant misalignment between MLLM judgments and human perceptual preferences, highlighting their limited reliability as general evaluators for AI-generated video realism.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Artifact-Bench基准，用于评估多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)在AI生成视频artifacts检测和分析方面的能力。通过建立涵盖写实、动画和CG风格视频的三层层次分类法，设计了三个互补任务。实验对19个主流MLLMs进行测试，揭示了当前模型在artifact感知和推理方面的重大局限性。
AI.motivation: 尽管视频生成模型的真实感有所提升，但其输出仍存在时间不一致、结构扭曲和语义不连贯等artifacts。现有的多模态大语言模型表现出强大的视觉理解能力，但它们感知和reasoning这些artifacts的能力尚不清楚。现有benchmarks缺乏对artifact感知和细粒度诊断reasoning的系统评估，尤其在不同AI生成视频领域beyond photorealistic内容。
AI.method: 构建了Artifact-Bench，一个全面的benchmark用于评估MLLMs在AI生成视频artifact检测和分析方面的工作。建立了一个三层层次taxonomy的真实性artifacts，涵盖写实、动画和CG风格视频。基于此定义了三个互补任务：(1)真人vs AI生成视频分类；(2)成对真实度比较；(3)细粒度artifact识别。对19个领先的MLLMs进行了实验。
AI.result: 实验揭示了在artifact感知和reasoning方面的重大局限性，许多模型在挑战性设置中接近随机甚至低于随机的性能。进一步观察到MLLM判断与人类感知偏好之间存在显著的不一致，突显了它们作为AI生成视频真实性的一般评估器的有限可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 当前的多模态大语言模型在AI生成视频artifact感知和reasoning方面存在严重不足，需要开发更强大的artifact感知和细粒度reasoning能力。 Artifact-Bench为系统评估MLLMs在这方面的能力提供了重要工具，有助于推动该领域的研究进展。

relevance_reason: While this paper touches on video quality assessment using VLMs (matching partially with the "Quality control and screening of generated videos using VLM" pain point), it focuses on artifact detection in general AI-generated videos - NOT on 3D human motion synthesis. The research profile explicitly seeks methods for bridging 2D video priors to 3D human motion and ensuring temporal consistency in synthesized 3D motions, which are specific to computer graphics for human motion generation. This paper addresses video artifact detection in a completely different application domain (general video generation), not 3D human motion generation. Therefore, despite using some similar methods (MLLMs/VLMs for quality assessment), the application domain mismatch makes it only moderately relevant at best.

title: EgoTraj: Real-World Egocentric Human Trajectory Dataset for Multimodal Prediction
summary: Accurately forecasting human trajectories from an egocentric perspective plays a central role in applications such as humanoid robotics, wearable sensing systems, and assistive navigation. However, progress in this direction remains limited due to the scarcity of egocentric trajectory datasets collected in real-world environments. Addressing this need, we introduce EgoTraj, an egocentric multimodal open dataset recorded using Meta Quest Pro (MQPro). EgoTraj contains 75 sequences of human navigation collected from multiple MQPro wearers in real-world urban environments. Each recording provides synchronized RGB video along with ground-truth data, including continuous time-synchronized 6-degree-of-freedom head poses, per-frame 3D eye gaze vectors, scene annotations. To the best of our knowledge, EgoTraj differs from typical egocentric trajectory datasets by capturing long-horizon, self-directed navigation across diverse urban routes with broad participant diversity. To demonstrate the potential of the dataset, we benchmark several state-of-the-art methods for egocentric trajectory prediction and conduct ablation studies to analyze the contributions of gaze, scene, and motion cues. The results highlight the utility of EgoTraj for AR-based perception, navigation, and assistive systems. The EgoTraj dataset, code, and EgoViz Dashboard are publicly available at https://github.com/yehiahmad/EgoTraj.

AI.tldr: EgoTraj是一个开放的元Quest Pro（MQPro）自我中心多模态数据集，包含75个人类导航序列，收集自真实城市环境中的多名MQPro佩戴者。
AI.motivation: 准确预测第一人称视角的人类轨迹在人形机器人、可穿戴传感系统和辅助导航中至关重要，但因真实环境中的自我中心轨迹数据集稀缺，相关研究进展受限。
AI.method: 引入EgoTraj数据集，包含75个序列，使用Meta Quest Pro记录，每个记录提供同步RGB视频及地面真值数据（6自由度头部姿态、每帧3D眼注视向量、场景注释）。并对多种最先进的自我中心轨迹预测方法进行基准测试和消融研究。
AI.result: EgoTraj与其他自我中心轨迹数据集不同，能够捕捉跨越不同城市路线的长期自主导航，具有广泛的参与者多样性。结果显示注视、场景和运动线索有助于整体性能提升，EgoTraj对AR感知的潜在应用价值。
AI.conclusion: EgoTraj数据集、代码和EgoViz Dashboard已在GitHub上公开可用，有助于推动AR感知、导航和辅助系统的研究。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on egocentric trajectory prediction for robotics/assistive navigation applications (collecting first-person trajectory data for humanoid robots and wearable systems). While it involves video data, it is NOT about computer graphics or video generation/synthesis. The research profile is specifically about computer graphics: synthesizing video outputs and 3D human motions using diffusion models, quality control with VLMs, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. This paper is about trajectory prediction for robotics - a completely different application domain focused on perception/anticipation rather than generation/synthesis.

title: LLM Agents Make Collective Belief Dynamics Programmable: Challenges and Research Directions
summary: Classical models of opinion dynamics assume human participants with bounded rationality and limited coordination. The rise of LLM-based agents introduces a qualitative shift: agents can now participate in online discussions at scale, maintain consistent persuasion strategies, and coordinate systematically. This paper argues that LLM agents make collective belief dynamics programmable, enabling deliberate steering of population-level beliefs. We term this emerging problem programmable collective belief control. Through controlled multi-agent simulations, we provide proof-of-concept evidence that coordinated AI agents can induce measurable belief shifts that stabilize within a few interaction rounds. We identify four structural properties (indistinguishability, persistence, contextuality, and configurability) that make detection and defense fundamentally difficult. Based on these findings, we outline a research agenda spanning theoretical foundations for adversarial belief dynamics, operational methods for system-level detection and intervention, and simulation infrastructure for scalable experimentation. Our goal is not to present a complete solution, but to articulate why this problem demands urgent attention and to provide a conceptual foundation for future work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"可编程集体信念控制"概念，研究基于LLM的智能体如何通过大规模在线讨论协调诱导人群信念变化。通过多智能体模拟实验证明，协同AI智能体可在几轮交互内引发稳定的信念偏移，并识别出四个使检测和防御根本困难的结构性特征（不可区分性、持久性、情境性和可配置性）。
AI.motivation: LLM-based agents introduce a qualitative shift in opinion dynamics - they can participate at scale, maintain consistent persuasion strategies, and coordinate systematically. This makes collective belief dynamics "programmable," enabling deliberate steering of population-level beliefs. The authors term this new challenge "programmable collective belief control."
AI.method: Controlled multi-agent simulations were conducted to provide proof-of-concept evidence that coordinated AI agents can induce measurable belief shifts.
AI.result: Coordinated LLM agents can induce measurable belief shifts that stabilize within a few interaction rounds. Four structural properties make detection and defense fundamentally difficult: indistinguishability (agents are hard to distinguish from humans), persistence (belief shifts last), contextuality (effects depend on context), and configurability (parameters can be adjusted).
AI.conclusion: This problem demands urgent attention from the research community. The authors propose a research agenda covering three areas: (1) theoretical foundations for adversarial belief dynamics, (2) operational methods for system-level detection and intervention, and (3) simulation infrastructure for scalable experimentation.

relevance_reason: COMPLETELY DIFFERENT FIELD. This paper is about LLM agents influencing collective beliefs/opinion dynamics in online discussions - it's in the domain of AI ethics, social computing, and computational social science. It has NOTHING to do with Computer Graphics, video generation, 3D human motion generation, or visual quality assessment. Even though both profiles mention "LLM," the application domains are completely unrelated: one is about generating/synthesizing visual content (graphics), the other is about manipulating human beliefs through dialogue (social AI). No overlap in methods or goals.

title: Interference-Aware Multi-Task Unlearning
summary: Machine unlearning aims to remove the contribution of designated training data from a trained model while preserving performance on the remaining data. Existing work mainly focuses on single-task settings, whereas modern models often operate in multi-task setups with shared backbones, where removing supervision for one task or instance can unintentionally affect others. We introduce multi-task unlearning with two settings: full-task unlearning, which removes a target instance from all tasks, and partial-task unlearning, which removes supervision only from selected tasks. We show that shared parameters couple the forget and retain sets, causing task-level interference on non-target tasks and instance-level interference on other instances. To address this issue, we propose an interference-aware framework that combines task-aware gradient projection, which constrains updates within task-specific subspaces, with instance-level gradient orthogonalization, which reduces conflicts between forget and retain signals. Experiments on two multi-task computer vision benchmarks across five tasks show that our method achieves effective unlearning while maintaining strong generalization, reducing UIS compared with the strongest baseline by 30.3% in full-task unlearning and 52.9% in partial-task unlearning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多任务场景下的机器遗忘问题，提出全任务遗忘和部分任务遗忘两种设置，并设计结合任务感知梯度投影和实例级梯度正交化的干扰感知框架，在两个多任务计算机视觉基准上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有工作主要关注单任务设置，而现代模型常在多任务环境中运行，移除一个任务或实例的监督可能影响其他任务或实例。共享参数会耦合遗忘集和保留集，导致任务级和实例级干扰。
AI.method: 提出干扰感知框架，包含两个方面：1) 任务感知梯度投影，将更新约束在任务特定的子空间内；2) 实例级梯度正交化，减少遗忘信号与保留信号之间的冲突。
AI.result: 在两个多任务计算机视觉基准上（五个任务）进行实验，全任务遗忘中UIS较最强基线降低30.3%，部分任务遗忘中降低52.9%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在有效实现遗忘的同时保持了较强的泛化能力，为多任务学习环境中的机器遗忘提供了可行的解决方案。

title: DecisionBench: A Benchmark for Emergent Delegation in Long-Horizon Agentic Workflows
comment: 28 pages, 9 figures, 11 tables. Code and data: https://huggingface.co/decisionbench
summary: We introduce DecisionBench, a benchmark substrate for emergent delegation in long-horizon agentic workflows. The substrate fixes a task suite (GAIA, tau-bench, BFCL multi-turn), a peer-model pool (11 models, 7 vendor families), a delegation interface (call_model plus an optional read_profile channel), a deterministic skill-annotation layer, and a multi-axis metric suite covering quality, cost, latency, delegation rate, routing fidelity-at-k, vendor self-preference, and a counterfactual-delegation ceiling. The substrate is agnostic to how peer information is generated or delivered, so learned routers, richer peer memories, adaptive profile construction, and multi-step delegation can all be evaluated against it. We characterize the substrate with a five-condition reference sweep on the full pool (n=23,375 task instances). Three benchmark-level findings emerge: (i) mean end-task quality is statistically indistinguishable across the four awareness conditions (|beta| <= 0.010, p >= 0.21), so quality-only evaluation would miss the orchestration signal; (ii) routing fidelity-at-1 ranges from 7.5% to 29.5% across conditions at near-equal mean quality, with delivery channel (on-demand tool vs. preloaded description) dominating description content; (iii) a counterfactual ceiling places perfect delegation 15-31 percentage points above measured performance on every suite, locating large unrealized headroom for future orchestration methods. We release the substrate, annotation layer, reference intervention suite, analysis pipeline, and 220 per-condition run archives.

AI.tldr: DecisionBench是一个用于评估长周期智能体工作流中委托能力的基准测试框架，包含任务套件、模型池、委托接口、技能标注层和多维度指标，可对学习路由器、peer记忆等进行评估。
AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏对智能体委托能力的系统化评估，需要一个能够衡量质量、成本、延迟、委托率、路由保真度等多维指标的通用基准 substrate，以推动委托方法的发展。
AI.method: 构建包含GAIA、tau-bench、BFCL多-turn等任务套件的固定基线，使用11个模型和7个厂商家族的peer池，通过call_model和read_profile通道进行委托，配备确定性技能标注层和五条件参考扫描（n=23,375任务实例）。
AI.result: (i)四种意识条件下端任务质量统计分析无显著差异(|beta|<=0.010,p>=0.)；(ii)路由保真度在7.5%-29.5%之间，传递通道主导描述内容；(iii)反事实上限显示完美委托比实测性能高15-31个百分点，存在较大未实现提升空间。
AI.conclusion: DecisionBench为委托系统的评估提供了标准化、可扩展的基准框架，揭示了当前委托方法的局限性，为未来编排方法的发展指明了方向。

The "quality" mentioned refers to task-level quality in agent workflows, not visual quality of generated content.

title: MedFM-Robust: Benchmarking Robustness of Medical Foundation Models
summary: Medical foundation models (MedFMs) have emerged as transformative tools in healthcare, demonstrating capabilities across diverse clinical applications. These models can be broadly categorized into two paradigms: Medical Vision-Language Models (Med-VLMs) and segmentation foundation models. Med-VLMs range from medical-specialized models such as LLaVA-Med and MedGemma, to general-purpose models like GPT-4o and Gemini, all capable of medical image understanding tasks including visual question answering (VQA), report generation, and visual grounding. Concurrently, the Segment Anything Model (SAM) has catalyzed a new generation of medical segmentation models, with adaptations like SAM-Med2D and MedSAM. The widespread clinical deployment of these models thus necessitates rigorous evaluation of their reliability under real-world conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文对医学基础模型进行了系统分类，将其划分为医学视觉语言模型和分割基础模型两大类，并指出这些模型在临床广泛应用前需要进行严格可靠性评估。
AI.motivation: 医学基础模型(MedFMs)在医疗领域展现出变革性潜力，但缺乏针对其真实世界临床部署可靠性的系统评估。
AI.method: 将MedFMs分为两大范式：医学视觉语言模型(Med-VLMs)和分割基础模型，并对各类代表性模型进行分类综述。
AI.result: 构建了完整的MedFMs分类体系，涵盖从专用模型(LLaVA-Med、MedGemma)到通用模型(GPT-4o、Gemini)的Med-VLMs，以及基于SAM的医学分割模型(SAM-Med2D、MedSAM)。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为后续评估MedFMs在真实世界临床条件下的可靠性奠定了分类框架基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Medical AI/Healthcare AI (medical foundation models for clinical diagnosis), which is completely different from the Computer Graphics domain. While both profiles mention "Vision Language Models," the application domains are fundamentally distinct: (1) Research profile focuses on video generation and 3D human motion generation in Computer Graphics; (2) This paper focuses on medical imaging diagnosis and clinical applications. Despite potential technical overlap in using VLMs, the domain, purpose, and target users are entirely different - this would be like comparing text-to-video generation with medical image analysis.

title: Personalized Face Privacy Protection From a Single Image
summary: Photos of faces uploaded online are vulnerable to malicious actors who can scrape facial images from online sources and intrude on personal privacy via unauthorized use of facial recognition models. This paper presents FaceCloak, a novel personalized face privacy protection system, which can generate defensive identity-specific universal face privacy masks from a single image of a user, causing facial recognition to fail. FaceCloak introduces a three-stage personalized face perturbation learning methodology: (1) It generates a small set of high-variety synthetic face images of a person based on a single image of the person. (2) It learns face cloaking by adding more protection to key facial-identity leakage regions through iterative perturbation generation over the small set of synthetic images, effectively shifting a user's identity embedding towards a distant anchor identity and away from a similar one. (3) It generates a personalized identity-protective mask in the form of pixel-wise cloaking, which is light-weight and can be efficiently applied to any facial image of a user while maintaining good perceptual quality. Extensive experiments on three popular face datasets across ten recognition models show the effectiveness of FaceCloak compared to 29 other existing representative methods. Code is available at https://github.com/zacharyyahn/FaceCloak

AI.tldr: FaceCloak是一种个人化的人脸隐私保护系统，可从单张用户图像生成防御性的人脸隐私掩码，导致人脸识别失败。该系统通过三阶段方法生成轻量级的像素级cloak，可高效应用于任何用户人脸图像。
AI.motivation: 在线上传的人脸图像容易被恶意行为者抓取，并利用人脸识别模型未经授权入侵个人隐私。
AI.method: 三阶段个性化人脸扰动学习：(1)基于单张图像生成高多样性合成人脸图像；(2)通过迭代扰动生成增强关键面部身份泄露区域的保护，将用户身份嵌入引向遥远锚身份；(3)生成像素级cloak形式的个性化身份保护掩码。
AI.result: 在三个人脸数据集和十个人脸识别模型上，比29种现有代表性方法更有效。
AI.conclusion: FaceCloak能有效保护用户人脸隐私，同时保持良好的感知质量。

The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics: diffusion-based video generation, 3D human motion synthesis, VLM quality assessment, and bridging 2D video priors to 3D motion. These fields are fundamentally different despite both using "diffusion models." title: LiFT: Lifted Inter-slice Feature Trajectories for 3D Image Generation from 2D Generators
summary: High-resolution 3D medical image generation remains challenging because fully volumetric models are computationally expensive, while efficient 2D slice generators often fail to preserve anatomical consistency across the third dimension. We propose LiFT, a framework for Lifted inter-slice Feature Trajectories that factorizes 3D volume synthesis into per-slice image generation and inter-slice trajectory learning. Rather than modeling the volumetric distribution end-to-end, LiFT treats a volume as an ordered trajectory in feature space, capturing how anatomical structures appear, transform, and disappear across depth. A tri-planar drifting loss aligns the trajectory of generated slices with the trajectories of real volumes, enabling distributional learning over inter-slice progressions in unconditional generation; in paired translation, a bidirectional $z$-context mixer trained against the registered target supplies through-plane coherence while preserving per-slice fidelity. We evaluate LiFT on BraTS 2023 (unconditional and missing-modality MR) and SynthRAD2023 (MR-to-CT). Across these settings, LiFT preserves per-slice quality, approaches the reported cWDM missing-MR reconstruction quality at $\sim$$135\times$ lower inference cost (without formal equivalence testing), and improves through-plane coherence on MR-to-CT relative to a no-mapper ablation, demonstrating that lightweight inter-slice trajectory learning is a viable route to high-resolution 3D medical synthesis.

AI.tldr: 提出LiFT框架，通过将3D体数据分解为slice级别生成和inter-slice轨迹学习，实现高效的3D医学图像合成。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率3D医学图像合成的挑战：完全体素模型计算成本高，而高效的2D切片生成器无法保持第三维度的解剖学一致性。
AI.method: 将3D体数据视为特征空间中的有序轨迹，建模解剖结构在深度维度上的外观、变换和消失；引入三平面漂移损失对齐生成切片与真实体数据的轨迹；在配对翻译中使用双向z-context mixer提供平面间一致性。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2023（无条件和缺失模态MR）和SynthRAD2023（MR到CT）上评估，达到了接近cWDM缺失-MR重建质量的水平，推理成本降低约135倍，并改善了MR到CT的平面间一致性。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级的inter-slice轨迹学习是高分辨率3D医学合成的可行路径，具有高效性和保真度。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D MEDICAL IMAGE generation (MRI/CT), which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics and 3D human motion generation. While both deal with "3D generation from 2D slices," medical imaging and human motion/video generation are distinct fields with different requirements, evaluation criteria, and downstream applications. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points: video quality control, 2D-to-3D human motion bridging, or temporal consistency for human motions.

title: Swimming with Whales: Analysis of Power Imbalances in Stake-Weighted Governance
summary: Voting methods weighted by stakes are the fundamental governance paradigm in Proof-of-Stake (PoS) blockchains. Such a paradigm is known to be prone to power distortions: a few users possessing large stakes may completely control decision making, even without owning the totality of the stakes. We study this phenomenon through the lens of computational social choice, focusing on the extent of power imbalances in stake-weighted voting when power is quantified using the Penrose-Banzhaf power index. Our work presents both analytical and empirical contributions. Analytically, we demonstrate that while a perfect alignment between power and relative stake ownership is generally unattainable, it can be approximated in expectation under specific conditions. Empirically, using data from a real-world on-chain governance system (Project Catalyst), we provide a more fine-grained understanding of the power imbalances that are likely to occur in current stake-weighted governance systems.

AI.tldr: 研究PoS区块链中质押权重投票制度的权力失衡问题，利用Penrose-Banzhaf权力指数量化分析，并结合真实链上治理数据实证验证。
AI.motivation: 当前PoS区块链采用质押权重投票作为核心治理范式，但存在权力扭曲现象：大户可能完全控制决策，即便不拥有全部质押代币。现有研究对这种权力失衡的程度和性质缺乏深入理解。
AI.method: 从计算社会选择理论角度，运用Penrose-Banzhaf权力指数量化权力；理论分析在特定条件下权力与质押ownership的期望近似对齐；实证使用Project Catalyst真实链上治理数据验证。
AI.result: 证明完美对齐一般不可达，但在特定条件可近似期望对齐；基于真实数据揭示当前质押权重治理系统中的权力失衡特征。
AI.conclusion: 为PoS治理系统的权力分布提供理论基础和实证洞察，有助于设计更公平的链上治理机制。

title: EngiAI: A Multi-Agent Framework and Benchmark Suite for LLM-Driven Engineering Design
comment: 26 pages, 10 figures, to be published at IDETC 2026
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly applied to engineering design tasks, yet existing evaluation frameworks do not adequately address multi-agent systems that combine simulation, retrieval, and manufacturing preparation. We introduce a benchmark suite with three evaluation dimensions: (1) a workflow benchmark with seven prompt styles targeting distinct cognitive demands-including direct tool use, semantic disambiguation, conditional branching, and working-memory tasks; (2) a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) benchmark with gated scoring isolating retrieval contributions to parameter selection; and (3) an High Performance Computing (HPC) benchmark evaluating end-to-end ML training orchestration on a SLURM cluster. Alongside the benchmark we present EngiAI, a Multi-Agent System (MAS) reference implementation built on LangGraph that operationalizes the benchmark by coordinating seven specialized agents through a supervisor architecture, unifying topology optimization, document retrieval, HPC job orchestration, and 3D printer control. Across four LLM backends and two EngiBench problems, proprietary models achieve 96-97% average task completion on Beams2D, while open-source 4B-parameter models reach 55-78%, with clear generational improvement. Conditional branching proves most challenging, with task completion dropping to 20-53% for the conditional style on Photonics2D. RAG gating confirms near-perfect retrieval-augmented scores ($\approx 1.0$) versus near-zero without retrieval, validating the evaluation design. On HPC orchestration, one model completes all pipeline steps in 100% of runs while another drops to 50%, revealing that multi-step instruction following degrades over long-running workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EngiBench基准套件，用于评估大型语言模型在工程设计中的多智能体系统表现，包含工作流、RAG和HPC三个评测维度，并开源了基于LangGraph的多智能体系统EngiAI作为参考实现。
AI.motivation: 现有评估框架未能充分涵盖结合仿真、检索和制造准备的多智能体系统，需要专门的工程设计任务评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了三维度评估基准：(1)包含七种提示风格的工作流基准，测试不同认知需求；(2)RAG基准通过门控评分隔离检索贡献；(3)HPC基准评估SLURM集群上的ML训练编排。同步提出EngiAI多智能体参考实现，通过监督架构协调七个专业化智能体。
AI.result: 在四个LLM后端和两个EngiBench问题上，专有模型在Beams2D上达到96-97%平均任务完成率，开放式4B参数模型达55-78%。条件分支最具挑战性，Photonics2D条件样式降至20-53%。RAG门控验证了检索增强的近满分与无检索的近零分对比。HPC编排中，一模型100%完成所有步骤，另一模型降至50%。
AI.conclusion: 条件分支和多步指令遵循是当前LLM的显著短板，RAG对参数选择至关重要，多智能体协同可有效提升工程设计任务完成率，但长流程下的指令following能力仍需改进。

It focuses on engineering design benchmarks (Beams2D, Photonics2D), SLURM cluster management, workflow automation, and RAG systems - none of which relate to video generation, 3D human motion synthesis, diffusion models, or visual quality assessment. The application domain is Software Engineering/AI Systems, not Computer Graphics. There is no overlap in methods or target application.

title: Progressive Autonomy as Preference Learning: A Formalization of Trust Calibration for Agentic Tool Use
summary: We formalize trust calibration for agentic tool use (deciding when an automated agent's proposed action may execute autonomously versus require human approval) as a preference-learning problem. A policy gateway maintains a Gaussian-process posterior over a latent human risk-tolerance function, observed through a probit likelihood on binary approve/deny feedback, and escalates to the human exactly where the approval outcome is most uncertain. We show this is structurally an instance of Preferential Bayesian Optimization, inheriting its inference machinery (approximate Gaussian-process classification) and its sample-efficiency argument (uncertainty-targeted querying), while differing in objective: classifying an action space into allow/block/ask regions rather than optimizing a design.

AI.tldr: 本文将智能体工具使用的信任校准形式化为偏好学习问题，通过高斯过程后验和probit似然来建模人类风险容忍度函数，并在结果最不确定时升级至人工审批，展示了这是优先贝叶斯优化的一个实例。
AI.motivation: 在自主智能体系统中，需要决定何时可自动执行动作、何时需人工审批。现有方法缺乏系统的信任校准机制，难以根据人类风险偏好动态调整自动化决策边界。
AI.method: 构建策略网关：使用高斯过程后验估计潜在人类风险容忍度函数，通过二值批准/拒绝反馈的probit似然观测该函数，在审批结果不确定性最大处升级至人工。
AI.result: 该方法在结构上等同于优先贝叶斯优化，可继承其近似高斯过程分类的推理框架和不确定性目标查询的样本效率优势，但目标是将动作空间分类为允许/阻止/询问区域而非优化设计。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自主智能体的可信部署提供了系统性的偏好学习和不确定性感知决策框架，在保持安全的同时最大化自主性。

relevance_reason: The paper is about trust calibration for autonomous agent tool use using preference learning and Gaussian processes. This is in the domain of AI/Autonomous Systems/HCI, NOT Computer Graphics.完全没有涉及视频生成、3D人体运动生成、扩散模型、VLM质量评估等计算机图形学核心内容。两者的应用领域完全不同。

title: CRAFT: Critic-Refined Adaptive Key-Frame Targeting for Multimodal Video Question Answering
comment: Accepted at ACL 2026 Multimodal Augmented Generation via MultimodAl Retrieval Workshop
summary: Grounded multi-video question answering over real-world news events requires systems to surface query-relevant evidence across heterogeneous video archives while attributing every claim to its supporting source. We introduce CRAFT (Critic-Refined Adaptive Key-Frame Targeting), a query-conditioned pipeline that combines dynamic keyframe selection, per-video ASR with multilingual fallback, and a hybrid critic loop to iteratively verify and repair claims before consolidation. The pipeline integrates UNLI temporal entailment, DeBERTa-v3 cross-claim screening, and a Llama-3.2-3B adjudicator, with a final citation-merging stage that emits each fact once with all supporting source identifiers. On MAGMaR 2026, CRAFT achieves the best overall average (0.739), reference recall (0.810), and citation F1 (0.635). We further evaluate on a MAGMaR-style conversion of WikiVideo with 52 non-overlapping event queries, where CRAFT also performs strongly (0.823 Avg), showing that its claim-centric evidence aggregation generalizes beyond MAGMaR. Ablations show that atomic claims, ASR, and the critic loop drive the main gains over the vanilla query-conditioned baseline. Code and implementation details are publicly available at https://github.com/bhosalems/CRAFT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CRAFT系统，用于基于真实世界新闻事件的多视频问答任务，通过动态关键帧选择、ASR多语言回退和混合批评循环来验证和修复声明，最后合并引用并输出每个事实及其支持的源标识符。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的新闻视频档案具有异构性，现有系统在surfacing查询相关证据和将声明归属于支持来源方面存在困难，需要一个能够迭代验证和修复声明的pipeline。
AI.method: CRAFT结合动态关键帧选择、per-video ASR（含多语言回退）、UNLI时间蕴含、DeBERTa-v3跨声明筛选、Llama-3.2-3B裁判器和引用合并阶段，形成混合批评循环以迭代验证和修复声明。
AI.result: 在MAGMaR 2026上达到0.739平均分、0.810引用召回率和0.635引用F1；在WikiVideo上达到0.823平均分。消融实验表明原子声明、ASR和批评循环是主要增益来源。
AI.conclusion: CRAFT通过claim-centric的证据聚合方法，在两个基准数据集上均取得先进性能，证明了其良好的泛化能力。代码已公开。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Video Question Answering for news video archives - analyzing real-world videos to verify claims. The research profile is about Computer Graphics: generating synthetic videos and 3D human motions with diffusion models, quality assessment of generated content, and bridging 2D video to 3D motion. While both involve video content, they are fundamentally different application domains - video understanding/QA vs. video generation/motion synthesis. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points about synthesized content quality control, 3D human motion generation, or temporal consistency in generated motions.

title: Memory-Augmented Reinforcement Learning Agent for CAD Generation
comment: 26 pages; multilingual submission: English version first, followed by Chinese version
summary: Automatic generation of computer-aided design (CAD) models is a core technology for enabling intelligence in advanced manufacturing. Existing generation methods based on large language models (LLMs) often fall short when handling complex CAD models characterized by long operation sequences, diverse operation types, and strong geometric constraints, primarily because reasoning chains break and effective error-correction mechanisms are lacking. To address this problem, this paper proposes a memory-augmented reinforcement learning framework for CAD generation agents. The framework encapsulates the underlying geometric kernel into a structured toolchain callable by the agent and builds a closed-loop mechanism of design intent understanding, global planning, execution, and multi-dimensional verification. It also designs a dual-track memory module consisting of a case library and a skill library, and proposes a dynamic utility retrieval algorithm. By introducing reinforcement learning into retrieval and policy optimization, the agent can effectively avoid retrieval traps in which examples are semantically similar but geometrically infeasible, enabling online self-correction and continual evolution without additional large-scale annotated data. Experiments show that the proposed method significantly improves both the success rate and geometric consistency on complex CAD model generation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对复杂CAD模型生成的难题，提出了一种记忆增强强化学习框架。该框架通过双轨记忆模块（案例库和技能库）、动态utility检索以及闭环验证机制，使智能体能够避免语义相似但几何不可行的检索陷阱，实现无需额外大规模标注数据的在线自修正和持续进化。实验验证了该方法在复杂CAD模型生成中的有效性和优越性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的CAD生成方法在处理复杂长操作序列、多样化操作类型和强几何约束的CAD模型时存在不足，主要因为推理链中断且缺乏有效的错误修正机制。
AI.method: 提出了记忆增强强化学习框架，整合几何内核为可调用工具链，构建设计意图理解、全局规划、执行和多维验证的闭环机制；设计了包含案例库和技能库的双轨记忆模块，提出动态utility检索算法；将强化学习引入检索和策略优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提高了复杂CAD模型生成任务的成功率和几何一致性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的记忆增强强化学习框架能够有效解决复杂CAD模型生成中的推理链断裂和错误修正问题，通过双轨记忆模块和动态utility检索算法实现无需大规模标注数据的在线自修正和持续演化。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses CAD (Computer-Aided Design) model generation, which is a completely different application domain from the research profile focusing on video generation and 3D human motion synthesis. While both fall under Computer Graphics, CAD generation deals with engineering design/architectural models with geometric constraints, whereas the profile targets temporal video outputs and human motion generation. The methods (reinforcement learning, memory modules) are applied to fundamentally different problems - generating design geometries vs. synthesizing temporal visual content/motions.

title: FAGER: Factually Grounded Evaluation and Refinement of Text-to-Image Models
comment: It was accepted for an oral presentation at the 2nd Workshop on the Evaluation of Generative Foundation Models (EVGENFM2026) at CVPR 2026. Total 8 pages (1 page for references). 5 figures
summary: Existing text-to-image (T2I) evaluation metrics mainly assess whether generated images align with information explicitly stated in the prompt, but often fail to capture factual requirements that are implicit, externally grounded, or identity-defining. As a result, they are not well suited for evaluating factual correctness in prompts involving scientific knowledge, historical facts, products, or culture-specific concepts. We propose FActually Grounded Evaluation and Refinement (FAGER), an agentic framework that evaluates whether generated images correctly reflect visually verifiable facts grounded in or implied by the prompt, while also providing actionable feedback for improvement. FAGER first constructs a structured factual rubric by combining LLM-based fact proposal with reference-guided visual fact extraction and verification, then converts the rubric into question-answer pairs for VLM-based evaluation. To validate FAGER as a factuality metric, we introduce a Factual A/B test, which measures whether a metric prefers factual reference images over corresponding generated images. Across five datasets spanning science, history, products, culture, and knowledge-intensive concepts, FAGER consistently outperforms prior metrics on this test. We further show that FAGER can be used to refine T2I outputs in a fully training-free manner, yielding substantial factuality gains across datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAGER框架，解决文本到图像模型中事实正确性评估难题，通过构建结构化事实规则和VLM评估，在多个领域数据集上表现优越，并支持无训练的图像优化。
AI.motivation: 现有T2I评估指标主要关注显式信息，忽略了隐式、外部 grounding 或身份定义的事实性需求，无法评估涉及科学知识、历史事实、产品和文化特定概念的prompt
AI.method:
1) 构建结构化事实规则：结合LLM事实提议与参考引导的视觉事实提取验证
2) 将规则转换为问答对用于VLM评估
3) 使用Factual A/B测试验证指标效果
4) 无需训练的图像精炼方法
AI.result: 在五个数据集（科学、历史、产品、文化和知识密集概念）上，FAGER一致优于先前指标；且能带来显著的事实性提升
AI.conclusion: FAGER是一个有效的用于评估文本到图像模型事实性的指标，能够用于无训练方式的图像改进

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on Text-to-Image generation (static images), which differs significantly from the research profile's focus on 3D human motion generation from video priors. Although both involve computer graphics and VLMs for quality assessment, the application domains are fundamentally different: image generation vs video-to-motion synthesis. The temporal consistency and 3D motion naturalness pain points are not addressed at all.

title: Knowing When Not to Predict: Self Supervised Learning and Abstention for Safer DR Screening
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) is now a standard way to pretrain medical image models, but performance is still mostly judged by downstream accuracy. For safety-critical screening tasks such as diabetic retinopathy grading, this is not enough: a model must also know when its predictions are unreliable and defer uncertain cases for clinical review. In this work, we examine how the length of SSL pretraining influences calibrated confidence and confidence-based abstention. We evaluate multiple SSL checkpoints under a fixed fine-tuning protocol and assess calibrated confidence, coverage, selective accuracy, and selective macro-F1. Across datasets and data regimes, SSL pretraining improves selective prediction compared to training from scratch. Unlike prior SSL studies that primarily evaluate downstream accuracy or AUROC, we analyze how SSL pretraining duration influences confidence behavior under calibrated confidence-based abstention. However, once accuracy saturates, selective performance can still change markedly across checkpoints, and longer pretraining does not consistently improve reliability. These results underscore the importance of abstention-aware evaluation and suggest that pretraining length should be treated as an important reliability-related design choice rather than only a computational detail. Code is available at GitHub.

AI.tldr: 研究自监督学习预训练时长如何影响医学图像模型在糖尿病视网膜病变筛查中的置信度校准和选择性 abstention 性能。
AI.motivation: 当前医学图像模型的评估主要关注下游准确率，但对于安全性关键的筛查任务（如糖尿病视网膜病变分级），模型不仅需要准确预测，还需要知道何时预测不可靠从而 defer 不确定案例进行临床审核。现有研究忽略了置信度行为的评估。
AI.method: 使用多个SSL检查点，在固定微调协议下评估，分析预训练时长对校准置信度、覆盖率、选择准确率和选择 macro-F1 的影响。
AI.result: SSL预训练提高了选择性预测性能。一旦准确率饱和，不同检查点之间的选择性性能仍可能发生显著变化，且更长的预训练并不一致地提高可靠性。在不同数据集和数据规律下均观察到类似现象。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了基于abstention的评估重要性，提示预训练时长应被视为可靠性相关的设计选择而非仅是计算细节。需要将置信度校准和不确定性量化纳入模型评估标准。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image analysis for diabetic retinopathy screening, which is in the healthcare/medical imaging domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics focusing on video generation, 3D human motion generation, and quality assessment using VLMs. These are completely different application domains - medical imaging vs. computer graphics/video synthesis. Even though both might use self-supervised learning or similar ML techniques, the application domain is fundamentally mismatched. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points (video feature extraction, quality control for generated videos, 3D human motion, temporal consistency).

title: Towards Data-Efficient Video Pre-training with Frozen Image Foundation Models
summary: Video foundation models achieve strong performance across many video understanding tasks, but typically require large-scale pre-training on massive video datasets, resulting in substantial data and compute costs. In contrast, modern image foundation models already provide powerful spatial representations. This raises an important question: can competitive video models be built by reusing these spatial representations and pre-training only for temporal reasoning? We take initial steps toward exploring a lightweight training paradigm that freezes a pre-trained image foundation model and trains only a recurrent temporal module to process streaming video. By reusing an image foundation model as a spatial encoder, this approach could significantly reduce the amount of video data and compute required compared to end-to-end video pre-training. In this work, we explore the feasibility of this approach before investing in computing for video pre-training. Our empirical findings across multiple video understanding tasks suggest that strong temporal performance can emerge without large-scale video pre-training, motivating future work on recurrent video foundation models obtained by pre-training a temporal module on top of a frozen image foundation model. Code: https://github.com/tue-mps/towards-video-image-frozen .

AI.tldr: 本文探索了一种轻量级视频模型训练范式：通过冻结图像基础模型作为空间编码器，只训练循环时间模块处理视频，从而避免大规模视频预训练。实验表明这种方法能在多个视频理解任务上取得良好性能，为未来循环视频基础模型的研究提供了可行性证据。
AI.motivation: 视频基础模型通常需要大规模预训练，消耗大量数据和计算资源。而现代图像基础模型已经提供了强大的空间表示能力。作者提出一个问题：能否通过重用这些空间表示，仅针对时间推理进行轻量级预训练来构建有竞争力的视频模型？
AI.method: 冻结预先训练好的图像基础模型作为空间编码器，只训练一个循环时间模块来处理流式视频。这种方法避免了端到端的视频预训练，大大减少了所需的视频数据和计算资源。
AI.result: 在多个视频理解任务上的实验表明，强大的时间性能可以在没有大规模视频预训练的情况下出现，证明了这种轻量级训练范式的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果支持了未来构建循环视频基础模型的工作，即在冻结的图像基础模型上预训练时间模块，为视频理解提供更高效的训练方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses video understanding/pretraining (extracting features from existing videos for recognition tasks), while the research profile focuses on VIDEO GENERATION for computer graphics (diffusion-based video generation, 3D human motion synthesis). These are fundamentally different applications - one is about analyzing/comprehending videos, the other is about synthesizing new video content. The paper doesn't address any of the stated pain points: no quality control of generated videos, no bridging 2D-to-3D domain gap, no motion generation, no temporal consistency in synthesized motions.

title: Not all uncertainty is alike: volatility, stochasticity, and exploration
summary: Adaptive decision-making in biological and artificial intelligence requires balancing the exploitation of known outcomes with the exploration of uncertain alternatives. Although prior work suggests that uncertainty generally promotes exploration, it has typically treated distinct sources of environmental uncertainty as equivalent. We consider environments with latent reward states that drift over time (volatility) and are observed through noisy outcomes (stochasticity). Both increase posterior uncertainty, yet we show they drive optimal exploration in opposite directions: volatility enhances it, stochasticity suppresses it. We establish this asymmetry formally by extending the Gittins index framework to Gaussian state-space bandits with latent dynamics. We further derive Cause-Aware Uncertainty-Sensitive Exploration (CAUSE), a closed-form exploration bonus obtained via control-as-inference that inherits the same monotonicities. CAUSE outperforms standard exploration strategies in environments with heterogeneous noise structure, and also improves on a Gittins-per-arm policy whose rested-bandit optimality does not transfer to restless settings. Learning and exploration are governed by the same noise-inference asymmetry, and the framework predicts that pathological noise inference produces \emph{reversed} rather than merely impaired exploration, with implications for computational accounts of psychiatric conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在可变环境中，自适应决策如何平衡探索与利用。先前工作将不同来源的不确定性视为等价，但本文发现：波动性(volatility)和随机性(stochasticity)虽都增加后验不确定性，却驱动最优探索朝相反方向发展——波动性增强探索，随机性抑制探索。通过将Gittins索引框架扩展到高斯状态空间bandits并结合控制as推理方法，导出CAUSE探索策略，在异构噪声结构环境中表现优异，并预测病态噪声推断会导致反向探索而非仅损害性探索。
AI.motivation: 核心动机是挑战传统观点——先前研究通常将不同来源的环境不确定性（如波动性与随机性）等价处理，忽视了它们对探索行为的差异化影响。论文旨在建立理解环境不确定性与探索之间关系的统一理论框架。
AI.method: 采用两类方法：一是扩展Gittins索引框架至具有潜在动态的高斯状态空间bandits，通过形式化推导建立波动性与随机性的不对称性；二是通过控制as推理（control-as-inference）方法推导出封闭形式的探索奖励机制——CAUSE。
AI.result: 主要发现：（1）波动性和随机性虽都增加后验不确定性，但驱动最优探索方向相反；（2）CAUSE在异构噪声结构环境中优于标准探索策略；（3）Gittins-per-arm策略的restless-bandit最优性不能转移；（4）学习与探索受同一噪声-推理不对称性支配；（5）病理噪声推断产生"反转"探索而非仅损害性探索。
AI.conclusion: 论文建立了环境不确定性与探索之间的系统性理论关系，揭示了波动性与随机性对决策的差异化影响。这一"噪声-推理不对称"原理为理解认知功能及精神疾病的计算模型提供了新视角。

relevance_reason: This paper is about reinforcement learning and decision theory (multi-armed bandits, Gittins indices, exploration-exploitation tradeoffs), which is entirely unrelated to Computer Graphics, video generation, 3D human motion synthesis, or any of the methods mentioned in the profile (diffusion models, VLM for quality assessment, visual feature extraction). The application domain is completely different - it's focused on adaptive decision-making in variable environments, not computer graphics or video/motion generation.

title: Quantized Machine Learning Models for Medical Imaging in Low-Resource Healthcare Settings
summary:
Deep learning models have shown strong performance in medical image analysis, but deploying them in low-resource clinical environments remains difficult due to computational, memory, and power constraints. This paper presents a multi-strategy compression framework for brain tumor classification from MRI, encompassing quantization-aware training, knowledge distillation from a DenseNet-101 teacher to a compact DenseNet-32 student with low-bit post-training quantization, and Float16 post-training quantization on a lightweight MobileNetV2 backbone.
  Using a multi-class brain tumor MRI dataset containing glioma, meningioma, pituitary tumors, and healthy controls, we provide full experimental validation of the MobileNetV2-based pipeline, training the classifier through a three-stage transfer learning process and applying Float16 quantization via TensorFlow Lite. The DenseNet-based distillation and quantization-aware training strategies are described as complementary compression approaches within the framework, with their complete empirical evaluation reserved for future work.
  Experimental results on the MobileNetV2 pipeline show that the quantized model achieves 82.37 percent validation accuracy compared to the 82.20 percent full-precision baseline, reducing model size from 35.34 MB to 5.76 MB, a 6.14x compression ratio with no meaningful accuracy loss. Per-class evaluation confirms that quantization preserves diagnostic performance uniformly across all four tumor categories. These findings demonstrate that lightweight quantized models can deliver clinically viable brain tumor screening in resource-constrained healthcare settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对脑肿瘤MRI分类的多策略压缩框架，结合知识蒸馏、量化感知训练和Float16后训练量化技术，在MobileNetV2上实现6.14x压缩比（35.34MB→5.76MB）且精度几乎无损（82.37% vs 82.20%）。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在医学图像分析中表现优异，但在低资源临床环境中部署面临计算、内存和功率限制的挑战。
AI.method: 多策略压缩框架包括：1)从DenseNet-101教师到DenseNet-32学生的知识蒸馏配合低位后训练量化；2)MobileNetV2轻量级骨干网上的Float16后训练量化；3)三阶段迁移学习训练流程，使用TensorFlow Lite进行Float16量化。
AI.result: 量化模型在包含胶质瘤、脑膜瘤、垂体瘤和健康对照的多类别脑肿瘤MRI数据集上达到82.37%验证准确率，相比全精度基线82.20%无明显下降；模型大小从35.34MB压缩至5.76MB，压缩比6.14x；各肿瘤类别的诊断性能保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级量化模型可在资源受限的医疗环境中实现临床可行的脑肿瘤筛查，为低资源临床环境下的医学AI部署提供了可行方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about Medical Imaging (brain tumor MRI classification) for healthcare, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically diffusion-based video generation, 3D human motion generation, and VLM quality assessment. Even though the paper uses knowledge distillation and quantization, these are general ML optimization techniques applied to medical diagnosis, not video/motion generation. The application domain (medical vs. graphics/animation) is fundamentally mismatched - this is like comparing medical image analysis to animated character synthesis.

title: Can Large Language Models Revolutionize Survey Research? Experiments with Disaster Preparedness Responses
summary: Survey research faces mounting structural challenges: declining response rates, sample bias, block-wise missingness among at-risk respondents, and AI-assisted fraudulent completions in online panels. Large language models (LLMs) have been proposed as a remedy, yet rigorous evaluations across the full survey workflow remain scarce, particularly in disaster contexts where data quality matters most. We present and evaluate a five-stage framework for LLM integration covering questionnaire design, sample selection, pilot testing, missing-data imputation, and post-collection analysis, using the 2024 Hurricane Milton preparedness survey of Florida residents (n=946) as a shared empirical testbed. We introduce a Protection Motivation Theory (PMT)-constrained co-occurrence knowledge graph and develop seven LLM configurations spanning zero-shot inference, retrieval-augmented baselines, and novel theory-informed variants. Our proposed Anchored Marginal Theory-Informed LLM (A-TLM) outperforms all three classical imputation baselines (IPW/MI, MICE+PMM, missForest) on RMSE under disaster-relevant block-wise MNAR conditions (S4 RMSE 1.439 vs. 1.496 for the next-best), while achieving near-zero signed bias (-0.121) where the random-forest imputer produces the largest absolute bias (-0.631). Organizing retrieval around PMT causal structure and integrating all evidence in a single model call outperforms unstructured retrieval and staged sequential inference (MAE 0.993 vs. 1.097 for standard RAG). We document that near-zero aggregate bias can mask opposing subgroup errors and propose subgroup-stratified bias auditing as a reporting standard. A retrieval-constrained knowledge-graph chatbot demonstrates that hallucination is architecturally manageable through grounded refusal.

AI.tldr: 研究提出五阶段框架，将大语言模型整合到调查研究的完整流程中，在2024年飓风米尔顿 Preparedness调查中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 调查研究面临多重结构挑战：回复率下降、样本偏差、高风险人群的块状缺失数据、以及在线面板中的AI辅助欺诈性回复。虽然LLM被提议作为解决方案，但在整个调查工作流程中严格评估仍然缺乏，尤其是在数据质量至关重要的灾害背景下。
AI.method: 该研究提出了一个五阶段框架，整合问卷设计、样本选择、试点测试、缺失数据插补和后收集分析。使用2024年飓风米尔尔顿 Preparedness调查(n=946)作为共享实证测试床。引入了保护动机理论(PMT)约束的共现知识图谱，并开发了七种LLM配置，包括零样本推理、检索增强基线和新的理论知情变体。提出了锚定边际理论知情LLM(A-TLM)。
AI.result: 提出的A-TLM在灾害相关块状MNAR条件下优于三类经典插补基线(IPW/MI, MICE+PMM, missForest)，RMSE为1.439对比下一最佳1.496实现了更低的RMSE，同时实现接近零的有符号偏差(-0.121)，而随机森林插补产生最大绝对偏差(-0.631)。围绕PMT因果结构组织检索并在单次模型调用中整合所有证据，优于非结构化检索和分阶段顺序推理(MAE 0.993 vs 1.097)。研究表明接近零的总体偏差可能掩盖对立的子组误差。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了LLM可以有效整合到调查研究工作流程中，特别是通过PMT因果结构约束的检索增强方法。A-TLM方法在灾害相关的缺失数据条件下表现最优。研究强调需要将子组分层偏差审计作为报告标准，以发现总体聚合偏差可能掩盖的子组误差。检索约束知识图谱聊天机器人表明，通过接地拒绝可以在架构上管理幻觉问题。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. This paper is about using LLMs for survey research methodology (handling missing data in disaster preparedness surveys), while the research profile focuses on Computer Graphics - specifically diffusion-based video generation, 3D human motion synthesis, VLM quality assessment for generated videos, and temporal consistency in motion synthesis. There is no overlap: the paper uses text-based LLMs for survey analysis, not for any computer graphics or video/motion generation tasks.

title: Causal Evidence for Attention Head Imbalance in Modality Conflict Hallucination
summary: Modality-conflict hallucination occurs when multimodal large language models (MLLMs) prioritize erroneous textual premises over contradictory visual evidence. To understand why visual evidence fails to prevail during generation, we take a mechanistic perspective and examine which internal components drive or resist this failure. We perform head-level causal analysis using path patching across five open-source MLLMs and identify two groups of attention heads with opposing causal roles: hallucination-driving heads and hallucination-resisting heads. We find a consistent asymmetry: driving effects are more broadly distributed and carry greater aggregate weight, whereas resisting effects concentrate in a small number of high-importance heads. Ablation experiments further confirm that these groups exert opposing effects during generation: distributed driving influence and localized resistance together form an imbalanced routing structure that biases generation toward the erroneous premise. Motivated by this finding, we propose MACI (Modality-conflict-Aware Causal Intervention), a conditional intervention that suppresses causally identified hallucination-driving heads only when conflict is detected. Across five MLLMs, MACI achieves the largest hallucination reduction among compared inference-time baselines on the MMMC benchmark with a favorable hallucination-accuracy trade-off, and transfers zero-shot to the SCI-SemanticConflict test.

AI.tldr: 研究多模态大语言模型的模态冲突幻觉问题，通过因果分析发现两类作用相反的注意力头，提出MACI条件干预方法可在检测到冲突时有针对性抑制导致幻觉的头部，显著降低幻觉同时保持较好的准确率
AI.motivation: 探究多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)在文本与视觉信息冲突时，为何视觉证据无法有效约束生成，即"模态冲突幻觉"问题
AI.method: 对五个开源MLLMs进行头部级别的因果分析，使用path patching技术，识别 hallucination-driving 和 hallucination-resisting 注意力头，并进行消融实验验证
AI.result: MACI在五个MLLMs上于MMMC基准测试中实现了最大的幻觉降低，且具有有利的幻觉-准确率权衡，并可零样本迁移到SCI-SemanticConflict测试
AI.conclusion: 模态冲突幻觉源于驱动影响分散与局部抵抗之间形成的 imbalance routing 结构；MACI条件干预通过选择性地抑制驱动幻觉的注意力头来缓解此问题

relevance_reason: This paper is about Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) and hallucination analysis - an NLP/AI interpretability topic, NOT Computer Graphics. While it mentions VLM (Vision Language Models), the application is completely different: it's studying how visual information fails to constrain text generation (modality conflict hallucination), not about video generation, 3D human motion, quality control of synthesized videos, or temporal consistency in computer graphics. The methods are also different: causal analysis and attention head manipulation vs diffusion-based video generation and motion models.

title: Smartphone-based Circular Plot Sampling for Forest Inventory
summary:
Circular sample plots are a cornerstone of forest inventory, yet accurate measurement of tree diameter at breast height (DBH) and spatial location within such plots remains challenging. Conventional approaches rely either on costly terrestrial LiDAR systems or labor-intensive manual methods involving calipers and compass bearings, limiting their scalability and accessibility in large scale environments. We present a lightweight, smartphone-based pipeline that enables complete plot sampling based tree measurement from a single walkthrough video, requiring no specialized hardware beyond a consumer smartphone mounted on a portable stand. The proposed method integrates pretrained monocular depth estimation and tree instance segmentation with a simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) framework to jointly refine camera trajectories and depth across the video sequence. Tree positions and DBH estimates are recovered by fusing SLAM-derived camera poses with segmented depth maps, with absolute real-world scale anchored via a calibrated reference length.
  The system was evaluated in both managed forest plots and natural forest plot, achieving a mean absolute error of 1.51 cm (MARE 3.98%) and 2.30 cm (MARE 5.69%) respectively, with consistent performance across varying starting directions and positions. Cross-video consistency analysis further demonstrated stable and reproducible tree localization across measurements initiated from different starting positions. The proposed approach achieves accuracy comparable to established field methods while substantially reducing equipment cost and operational complexity, making it accessible to both professional researchers and non-expert forest managers in diverse operational settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于智能手机的轻量化树木测量管道，利用单段步行视频实现林木DBH和空间位置的自动测量，整合单目深度估计、实例分割与SLAM技术，在管理林分和天然林分中分别达到1.51cm和2.30cm的平均绝对误差，精度相当于传统野外方法，但大幅降低了设备成本和操作复杂度。
AI.motivation: 圆形样地是森林资源调查的基石，但精确测量树高（DBH）和空间位置仍面临挑战。传统方法依赖昂贵的地面激光雷达或耗力的人工卡尺和罗盘测量，限制了在大规模环境中的可扩展性和可及性。
AI.method: 提出一种基于智能手机的轻量化管道，只需一段步行视频即可完成样地内所有林木的测量。整合预训练的单目深度估计模型、树木实例分割与SLAM框架，联合优化相机轨迹和深度；通过融合SLAM导出的相机姿态与分割的深度图恢复树木位置和DBH估计，并利用校准的参考长度锚定绝对尺度。
AI.result: 在管理林分和天然林分中进行评估，平均绝对误差分别为1.51cm（MARE 3.98%）和2.30cm（MARE 5.69%），在不同起始方向和位置下均表现一致。跨视频一致性分析表明，从不同起始位置开始的测量均能实现稳定、可重复的树木定位。
AI.conclusion: 该方法达到了与已有野外方法相当的精度，同时大幅降低了设备成本和操作复杂度，使专业研究人员和非专家森林管理者在各种作业环境中都能轻松使用。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant to the research profile. The application domain is forestry/forest inventory (tree measurement using smartphones), which has no connection to Computer Graphics, video generation, or 3D human motion synthesis. Although the paper uses some computer vision techniques (monocular depth estimation, instance segmentation, SLAM), these are used for tree measurement rather than the specified methods (diffusion-based video generation, VLM quality assessment, 3D human motion generation). None of the research profile's pain points are addressed.

title: Rotation-Aligned Key Channel Pruning for Efficient Vision-Language Model Inference
summary: Vision-Language Models suffer severe KV cache pressure at inference, as a single image often encodes into thousands of tokens. Most existing methods exploit token sparsity through token pruning, but permanently discarding visual content causes substantial degradation on fine-grained perception tasks. This motivates a complementary axis, feature sparsity: under a fixed KV cache budget, compressing the channel dimension preserves more visual tokens at the same memory cost. Prior Key channel pruning methods, however, face a structural trade-off: token-wise channel pruning is expressive but unstructured and slow, while head-wise approach is hardware-friendly but less robust. We resolve this with RotateK, a rotation-based structured Key channel pruning framework. RotateK applies an online PCA-based rotation that aligns token-dependent channel importance into a shared low-dimensional subspace, enabling accurate pruning under lightweight head-wise masks; a fused Triton attention kernel operates directly on sparse-channel Keys for efficient decoding. Experiments on two representative VLM backbones show that RotateK consistently outperforms prior Key channel pruning in both accuracy and decoding latency, while joint token-channel pruning improves over token-only baselines at matched KV cache budgets.

AI.tldr: RotateK是一种基于旋转的结构化键通道剪枝框架，用于缓解视觉语言模型推理中的KV缓存压力。它通过在线PCA旋转将token依赖的通道重要性对齐到共享低维子空间，在轻量级头掩码下实现准确剪枝，并配合Triton注意力内核实现高效解码。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型推理中，单张图像常被编码为数千个令牌，导致严重的KV缓存压力。现有方法使用token剪枝，但会丢弃重要视觉信息，在细粒度感知任务上造成显著降级。特征维度压缩可在相同内存成本下保留更多视觉token。之前的方法在结构化程度上存在两难：token-wise通道剪枝表达力强但非结构化且慢，head-wise方法硬件友好但鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 提出RotateK，一种基于旋转的结构化键通道剪枝框架。核心创新包括：(1)应用在线PCA-based旋转，将token依赖的通道重要性对齐到共享低维子空间，使头级别掩码能实现准确剪枝；(2)设计融合的Triton注意力内核，直接在稀疏通道KEY上操作实现高效解码。在两个代表性VLM backbone上验证，与token-only基线相比，联合token-通道剪枝在匹配KV缓存预算下性能更优。
AI.result: 实验表明：(1)RotateK在准确率和解码延迟上均一致优于之前key通道剪枝方法；(2)联合token-通道剪枝在匹配的KV缓存预算下优于纯token剪枝基线。RotateK兼顾了表达力和硬件效率，解决了原有方法中结构化程度与效率的两难问题。
AI.conclusion: RotateK成功实现了在硬件友好条件下保持高表达力的key通道剪枝，为VLM推理效率提升提供了新思路。该方法证明了特征稀疏性与token稀疏性联合优化的潜力，为未来高效VLM推理研究指明了方向。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on efficient VLM inference optimization (KV cache compression), which is a completely different application domain than the research profile's needs. The profile is about Computer Graphics: video generation, 3D human motion generation, and using VLMs for quality assessment of generated content. This paper is about making VLMs computationally efficient for general vision-language tasks - not about generating videos or motion, nor about assessing video quality. While both involve VLMs, they serve completely different purposes (optimization vs. generation/assessment). The paper does not address any of the four pain points mentioned.

title: HAVEN: Hierarchically Aligned Multimodal Benchmark for Unified Video Understanding
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) exhibit strong performance on standard video tasks, their ability to faithfully summarize and reason over complex narratives remains poorly evaluated. Existing summarization benchmarks fragment supervision across isolated granularities, such as keyframes, key shots, or disjointed text summaries, failing to capture the inherently hierarchical structure of cross-modal alignment. To address this critical gap, we introduce HAVEN, a hierarchically aligned multimodal benchmark for unified video understanding. HAVEN pioneers a fully granular (frame, shot, and video levels) and fully multimodal (video and text) dataset architecture, complete with explicit, continuous alignment between modalities. Built upon this unified annotation paradigm, we propose a comprehensive evaluation suite spanning summarization, temporal reasoning, multimodal grounding, and saliency ranking. Extensive benchmarking of state-of-the-art MLLMs exposes a persistent gap between surface-level textual fluency and grounded multimodal understanding. Ultimately, HAVEN advances the evaluation of multimodal systems beyond traditional QA formats, offering a rigorous, standardized testbed to drive future research in interpretable, hierarchical video understanding. We publicly release the dataset, benchmark suite, and evaluation protocols.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了HAVEN，一个用于统一视频理解的分层对齐多模态基准。现有视频摘要基准只关注单一粒度（如关键帧、关键镜头或离散文本摘要），无法捕捉跨模态对齐的层级结构。HAVEN提供了完全多模态（视频和文本）和完全粒度（帧、镜头和视频级别）的数据集架构，包含显式的连续模态对齐。
AI.motivation: 在复杂叙事摘要和推理方面，多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）的能力仍缺乏充分评估。现有基准将监督分散在孤立的粒度上，fragmenting supervision across isolated granularities，无法捕捉跨模态对齐的固有的层级结构。
AI.method: 构建了HAVEN数据集，包含帧级别、镜头级别和视频级别的标注，以及视频和文本的显式连续对齐；开发了综合评估套件，涵盖摘要生成、时间推理、多模态定位和显著性排序；广泛测试了最先进的MLLMs。
AI.result: 对顶尖MLLMs的广泛基准测试揭示了表面层面文本流利性与基于多模态的深入理解之间持续存在差距。
AI.conclusion: HAVEN推动多模态系统评估超越传统问答格式，提供了严格的标准化测试平台，以促进未来可解释的、分层视频理解研究。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on video understanding (analyzing videos with MLLMs for summarization, temporal reasoning), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically video/motion GENERATION and 3D human motion synthesis from video. These are fundamentally opposite application domains: video understanding (input: video → output: text/analysis) vs. video generation (input: text/other signals → output: video/motion). While both involve video, HAVEN benchmarks MLLMs on video analysis tasks, not video generation or 3D human motion generation. There is also no mention of diffusion models, VLM for quality control of generated videos, or 3D human motion generation - the core methods in the research profile.

title: Robust Mitigation of Age-Dependent Confounding Effects via Sample-Difficulty Decorrelation
summary: Age dependent performance disparities in medical image classification often arise because age acts as a confounder, linking imaging morphology with disease prevalence. In practice, disparities can manifest as overdiagnosis at ages where disease prevalence is higher and underdiagnosis at ages where prevalence is lower, and can worsen under train test shifts in the age distribution. Conventional mitigation approaches that enforce strict age invariance may suppress diagnostically meaningful information encoded in age. We therefore propose a robust framework that mitigates the effects of age-dependent confounding by targeting spurious age linked trends rather than enforcing invariance. Following a warm-up phase, we characterize sample difficulty and model its age-dependent trends in a label-conditioned manner. We decorrelate age from dominant age difficulty trends using robust, Huber weighted affinity weights, attenuating confounding-driven shortcuts while preserving clinically meaningful, nonlinear age information. We further introduce an Age Coverage Score that scales the decorrelation penalty by minibatch age variance to ensure stable optimization under limited age diversity. Across two radiology datasets, our approach reduces age dependent true and false positive disparities with minimal AUC impact and remains robust to increasing train test age distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒的框架，旨在减轻医学图像分类中年龄依赖的混淆效应，同时保留临床上有意义的非线性年龄信息。通过对样本难度进行年龄相关趋势建模，并使用Huber加权亲和力权重解耦年龄与主要年龄难度特征，实现这一目标。
AI.motivation: 年龄在医学图像分类中是重要的混淆因素，它将成像形态与疾病患病率联系起来。这导致在疾病患病率较高的年龄组过度诊断，在患病率较低的年龄组诊断不足，且在训练-测试年龄分布变化时问题加剧。传统方法强制年龄不变性会丢失诊断意义上与年龄相关的信息。
AI.method: 1) 先进行warm-up阶段；2) 表征样本难度，并以标签为条件建模其年龄依赖趋势；3) 使用鲁棒的Huber加权亲和力权重，将年龄与主导的年龄难度趋势解耦，削弱混淆驱动的捷径同时保留临床有意义的非线性年龄信息；4) 引入年龄覆盖分数，按小批量年龄方差缩放解耦惩罚，确保在有限年龄多样性下的稳定优化。
AI.result: 在两个放射学数据集上，该方法减少了年龄依赖的真阳性率和假阳性率差异，对AUC影响很小，并在训练-测试年龄分布偏移增加时保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过针对虚假的年龄关联趋势而非强制 invariance，有效平衡了公平性与诊断 성능，为医学影像AI中的年龄偏见问题提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on medical image classification, specifically addressing age-dependent confounding effects in radiology datasets.
