The application domain is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - it's healthcare/medical AI, not video generation, 3D human motion synthesis, or any computer graphics task. While both fields might use machine learning, the methods (sample difficulty modeling, Huber weighting) serve entirely different purposes with no overlap in goals or applications.

title: Agentic Trading: When LLM Agents Meet Financial Markets
summary: A growing body of work explores how Large Language Models (LLMs) can be embedded in trading systems as agents that perceive market information, retrieve context, reason about decisions, emit tradable actions, and adapt under market feedback. This paper reframes LLM-based trading agents as expert-system decision pipelines and presents an audit-oriented evidence map of 77 included studies in a protocol-coded snapshot screened through 2026-03-09. A primary empirical subset (n=19) satisfies the minimum boundary of Action Output plus Closed-Loop Evaluation; the remaining 58 included studies are retained as background and design context. The central empirical finding is protocol incomparability: within the primary subset, only 2/19 studies report extractable time-consistent split protocols, 1/19 reports an explicit transaction-cost model, 1/19 documents universe or survivorship handling, 11/19 report execution timing or semantics, 15/19 are coded as R0, and no study reaches R3 reproducibility. We therefore use Architecture-Capability-Adaptation as a working analytical lens rather than a validated taxonomy, and we foreground the evidence ledger, reproducibility audit, and reporting checklist as the main contributions. The resulting survey shows that architectural experimentation is expanding rapidly, while comparable evaluation protocols, execution semantics, and reproducible artifacts remain the field's immediate bottlenecks.

AI.tldr: 该论文是一项关于大型语言模型(LLM)在交易系统中作为智能体的系统性综述，审查了77项研究，重点关注19项满足核心实证标准的研究，旨在评估该领域的评估协议可比较性和可复现性。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM在金融交易系统中的应用快速增长，但缺乏对该领域研究方法的系统性审查和评估，尤其关注可复现性、评估协议标准化等关键问题。
AI.method: 采用审计导向的证据地图方法，对截至2026年3月9日的77项研究进行协议编码筛选，建立主要实证子集(n=19)和背景设计上下文(n=58)的分类体系，运用架构-能力-适应分析框架进行评估。
AI.result: 核心发现是协议不可比较性：仅2/19研究有可提取的时间一致分割协议，1/19有明确的交易成本模型，1/19记录了宇宙或幸存者处理，11/19报告了执行时间或语义，15/19被编码为R0水平，无研究达到R3可复现性。
AI.conclusion: LLM交易智能体的架构实验正在快速扩展，但可比较的评估协议、执行语义和可复现 artifact 仍是该领域面临的紧迫瓶颈。研究呼吁建立更标准的评估框架和报告规范。

relevance_reason: The paper is about applying Large Language Models (LLMs) to financial trading systems - completely in the Finance domain, not Computer Graphics. There is ZERO overlap with the research profile: no video generation, no 3D human motion generation, no diffusion models for visual content, no VLM for visual quality assessment. The methods (LLMs for trading, audit/review methodology) are entirely unrelated to diffusion-based video generation, visual feature extraction, or cross-modal learning pipelines needed for the stated pain points. This is a finance paper that has no relevance to computer graphics research.

title: PhyWorld: Physics-Faithful World Model for Video Generation
summary: World simulators can provide safe and scalable environments for training Physical AI systems before real-world deployment. Large video generation models are emerging as a promising basis for such simulators because they can generate diverse and realistic visual futures. However, using them as world simulators requires physically faithful video continuations, namely, generated videos that preserve the physical state implied by the conditioning input, and evolve in ways consistent with basic physical principles. We propose PhyWorld, a video generation world model designed to produce temporally coherent and physically faithful scene continuations through two-stage post-training. In the first stage, we improve video-to-video continuation with flow matching fine-tuning, encouraging stable visual attributes and coherent motion dynamics across frames. In the second stage, we align generated dynamics with physical principles using Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) over physics preference pairs, guiding the model toward outputs with higher physical plausibility. To evaluate PhyWorld, we use both standard video-quality benchmarks and a dedicated physical-faithfulness benchmark with per-law scoring. Experiments show that PhyWorld improves video consistency, achieving an average score of 0.769 on VBench compared with 0.756 or below for state-of-the-art baselines. PhyWorld also improves physical plausibility, reaching an average score of 3.09 on our physical-faithfulness benchmark compared with 2.99 for the strongest baseline. These results suggest that post-training large video generation models with continuation and physics-preference signals can make them more effective world simulators for Physical AI.

AI.tldr: PhyWorld是一个用于物理AI的世界模拟器视频生成模型，通过流程匹配微调和直接偏好优化的两阶段后训练，提升视频延续的时空一致性和物理可信度，在VBench和物理忠诚度基准上均取得领先成绩。
AI.motivation: 大型视频生成模型有潜力成为物理AI系统的世界模拟器，但作为世界模拟器需要物理上忠实的视频延续——即保持输入暗示的物理状态并以符合基本物理原则的方式演化的生成视频。现有的视频生成模型难以满足这一要求。
AI.method: 提出PhyWorld视频生成世界模型，采用两阶段后训练方法：第一阶段使用流程匹配(Flow Matching)微调改进视频到视频的延续能力，促进稳定的视觉属性和跨帧连贯的运动动态；第二阶段使用直接偏好优化(DPO)在物理偏好对上进行训练，使生成的动态符合物理原理。同时构建专用的物理忠诚度基准测试进行评估。
AI.result: PhyWorld在标准视频质量基准VBench上平均得分0.769，优于最先进基线的0.756；在专用物理忠诚度基准上平均得分3.09，优于最强基线的2.99。
AI.conclusion: 研究证明了通过两阶段后训练（流程匹配微调和直接偏好优化）可以显著提升大型视频生成模型作为物理AI世界模拟器的能力。PhyWorld在视频质量和物理可信度方面均优于现有最佳基线方法，验证了后训练大型视频生成模型进行场景延续和物理偏好信号优化的有效性。

relevance_reason: While both involve diffusion-based video generation and temporal consistency, this paper addresses GENERAL video generation for physical AI/world models - NOT 3D human motion generation specifically. The research profile explicitly focuses on bridging 2D video priors to 3D HUMAN MOTION and ensuring naturalness in synthesized 3D MOTIONS. PhyWorld targets physical faithfulness in generic video continuation, which is a different application domain from computer graphics human motion synthesis. The methods (flow matching, DPO) are loosely related but applied to different goals. This is a case of similar high-level methods used in different application domains.

title: Generative Recursive Reasoning
summary: How should future neural reasoning systems implement extended computation? Recursive Reasoning Models (RRMs) offer a promising alternative to autoregressive sequence extension by performing iterative latent-state refinement with shared transition functions. Yet existing RRMs are largely deterministic, following a single latent trajectory and converging to a single prediction. We introduce \emph{Generative Recursive reAsoning Models (GRAM)}, a framework that turns recursive latent reasoning into probabilistic multi-trajectory computation. GRAM models reasoning as a stochastic latent trajectory, enabling multiple hypotheses, alternative solution strategies, and inference-time scaling through both recursive depth and parallel trajectory sampling. This yields a latent-variable generative model supporting conditional reasoning via $p_θ(y \mid x)$ and, with fixed or absent inputs, unconditional generation via $p_θ(x)$. Trained with amortized variational inference, GRAM improves over deterministic recurrent and recursive baselines on structured reasoning and multi-solution constraint satisfaction tasks, while demonstrating an unconditional generation capability. \href{https://ahn-ml.github.io/gram-website/}{https://ahn-ml.github.io/gram-website}

AI.tldr: GRAM是一种将递归.latent推理转化为概率多轨迹计算的框架，通过随机.latent轨迹支持多假设和多种解法，采用摊销变分推断训练，在结构和约束推理任务上取得改进。
AI.motivation: 现有递归推理模型(RRM)是确定性的，只能遵循单一.latent轨迹并收敛到单个预测。无法实现多假设、多解法或推理时的计算扩展。
AI.method: 采用摊销变分推断(amortized variational inference)训练，将递归.latent推理建模为随机.latent轨迹，支持递归深度和并行轨迹采样两种 inference-time 扩展策略。
AI.result: 在结构化推理和约束满足任务上优于确定性递归和递归基线方法，并展示了无条件生成能力。
AI.conclusion: GRAM通过将递归推理转化为概率多轨迹计算，为神经推理系统提供了一种新的扩展方式。它不仅支持条件推理p_θ(y|x)，还支持无条件生成p_θ(x)，在结构化推理和约束满足任务上优于确定性基线方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about recursive reasoning and variational inference for structural/constraint satisfaction tasks - completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. The research profile focuses on diffusion-based video generation, 3D human motion generation, and VLM quality assessment for visual content. There is no match in application domain, methodology, or research area. This is an NLP/reasoning paper with no relevance to computer graphics, video synthesis, or motion generation.

title: Conflict-Resilient Multi-Agent Reasoning via Signed Graph Modeling
summary: LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) have demonstrated strong reasoning and decision-making capabilities that consistently surpass those of single LLM agents. However, their performance often suffers from naive aggregation mechanisms that assume uniformly cooperative interactions. Upon close inspection, we observe that existing graph-based MAS frameworks (1) propagate errors when conflicting signals arise without control, and (2) lack explicit modeling of conflicting inter-agent relations as well as structural awareness, failing to identify reliable interaction patterns. To bridge this gap, we introduce SIGMA, a novel SIgned Graph-informed Multi-Agent reasoning framework that explicitly captures trust, conflict, and neutral relations among agents via a signed relational graph. Specifically, given a query, SIGMA first selects a set of relevant and diverse agents, then constructs a structured signed interaction graph with confidence-weighted edges. Reasoning proceeds through conflict-aware signed message passing, which reinforces information from trustworthy agents while suppressing conflicting signals, and terminates with a structure- and conflict-aware weighted aggregation to yield globally consistent and conflict-resilient predictions. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets, across multiple LLM backbones and diverse multi-agent configurations, demonstrate that SIGMA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving notable gains in both accuracy and conflict-resilient performance.

AI.tldr: SIGMA是一个基于大语言模型的多智能体系统框架，通过显式建模智能体间的信任、冲突和中立关系（使用带符号的关系图），结合冲突感知的消息传递和结构感知的聚合机制，解决现有图中多智能体系统在处理冲突信号时的误差传播问题，显著提升准确性和冲突弹性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统在聚合机制上存在naive假设，导致(1)冲突信号出现时无控制地传播错误，(2)缺乏对冲突的智能体间关系的显式建模和结构感知，无法识别可靠交互模式。
AI.method: 提出SIGMA框架：1)选择相关且多样化的智能体集合；2)构建带置信度加权的符号交互图；3)通过冲突感知的符号消息传递，强化可信智能体信息、抑制冲突信号；4)采用结构和冲突感知的加权聚合生成最终预测。
AI.result: 在6个基准数据集、多LLM主干和多样化多智能体配置下，SIGMA一致优于SOTA基线，在准确性和冲突弹性方面取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模智能体间的信任/冲突/中立关系并引入冲突感知的消息传递机制，SIGMA成功解决了传统多智能体系统中的误差传播和冲突处理问题，为LLM多智能体协同推理提供了新的有效范式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multi-agent LLM systems for conflict-resilient reasoning using signed graph modeling - it's in the NLP/AI domain, not Computer Graphics. The research profile specifically requires expertise in diffusion-based video generation, 3D human motion generation, VLM for video quality assessment, and visual feature extraction. There is no application domain match whatsoever - this is entirely different research area.

title: What Makes Synthetic Data Effective in Image Segmentation
summary: Driven by rapid advances in large-scale generative models, synthetic data has emerged as a promising solution for visual understanding. While modern diffusion models achieve remarkable photorealistic image synthesis, their potential in complex visual segmentation tasks remains underexplored. In this work, we conduct a systematic analysis of synthetic images from state-of-the-art diffusion models to uncover the factors governing their utility. In particular, synthetic images characterized by dense scene composition and fine instance fidelity demonstrate distinctive benefits, yielding significantly more discriminative spatial representations. Building on these insights, we propose SENSE, a unified framework that leverages flexible and scalable synthetic data to substantially enhance segmentation performance. Notably, SENSE is model-agnostic, compatible with diverse architectures (e.g., DPT and Mask2Former), and scales effectively across models with varying parameter capacities. Extensive experiments on Cityscapes, COCO, and ADE20K validate the effectiveness and generalization capability of our approach. Code is available at https://github.com/zhang0jhon/SENSE.

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了扩散模型生成的合成图像对视觉分割任务的影响，发现稠密场景构图和细粒度实例保真度是关键因素，并提出SENSE框架，利用合成数据显著提升分割性能，且适用于多种架构。
AI.motivation: 大型生成式模型的快速发展使合成数据成为视觉理解的有望解决方案，但扩散模型在复杂视觉分割任务中的潜力尚未被充分探索，缺乏对影响合成图像实用性的因素的深入分析。
AI.method: 对当前最先进的扩散模型生成的合成图像进行系统性分析，探索影响其用于分割任务效用的因素；基于分析结果提出SENSE统一框架，利用灵活可扩展的合成数据增强分割性能，该框架与多种架构（DPT、Mask2Former）兼容且具有良好的可扩展性。
AI.result: 具有稠密场景构图和细粒度实例保真度的合成图像能产生更具判别性的空间表示，显著提升分割性能；在Cityscapes、COCO和ADE20K数据集上验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 首次系统性地分析了扩散模型合成图像对分割任务的影响；SENSE框架是模型无关的，能有效利用合成数据提升不同容量模型的分割性能，具有良好的泛化和可扩展特性。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses image segmentation using synthetic images from diffusion models, which is fundamentally different from the research profile's needs. The profile requires: (1) video generation with diffusion models, (2) 3D human motion generation, (3) VLM for quality assessment of generated videos, and (4) bridging 2D video-to-3D motion domain gap. While both papers use diffusion models, they operate in completely different application domains - 2D image segmentation vs. video/3D motion synthesis. The paper does not address any of the four pain points: visual guidance feature extraction, VLM-based quality control, 2D-to-3D domain bridge, or temporal consistency in 3D motion. Using similar methods (diffusion) in different applications does not make it relevant for this specific research area.

title: iGSP:Implicit Gradient Subspace Projection for Efficient Continual Learning of Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models require efficient adaptation to continually emerging downstream tasks. While Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning mitigates catastrophic forgetting, assigning isolated modules per task leads to parameter explosion. Conversely, recent similarity-driven sharing mechanisms falsely equate superficial visual similarity with underlying alignment consistency. This fundamental mismatch triggers severe negative transfer between visually similar but logically distinct tasks and fails to exploit alignment reuse across visually diverse ones. We argue thatalignment sharing is fundamentally a geometric problem of overlapping optimization trajectories within shared low-rank subspaces. Grounded in this insight, we propose iGSP, a novel framework that achieves efficient adaptation via implicit gradient subspace projection. Leveraging the early convergence of MoE routers to establish the subspace basis, iGSP bifurcates the adaptation process into two phases. First, the Subspace Identification phase introduces candidate experts via basis pre-expansion, applies a novel subspace-constrained regularization to implicitly project new task gradients onto the historical subspace, and precisely prunes redundant dimensions by treating routing probabilities as gradient flow indicators, ultimately to maximize knowledge reuse. Second, the Orthogonal Subspace Fine-Tuning phase fixes this structural basis and removes the regularization to rapidly fit the task-specific residual loss. Extensive experiments on the MTIL benchmark demonstrate that iGSP achieves state-of-the-art accuracy while significantly improving training efficiency, reducing the average trainable parameters by 42.7\% compared to current SOTA methods, and decreasing the final total parameters by 86.9\% relative to counterparts. The source code is available at https://github.com/GeoX-Lab/iGSP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出iGSP框架，通过隐式梯度子空间投影实现视觉-语言模型的高效任务适应，解决传统方法中参数爆炸和负迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型在持续适应下游任务时面临两大挑战：1)参数高效微调虽缓解灾难性遗忘，但孤立模块导致参数激增；2)现有的相似性共享机制错误地将表观视觉相似等同于对齐一致性，引起视觉相似但逻辑不同任务间的严重负迁移，同时未能利用视觉多样性任务间的对齐复用。
AI.method: 提出iGSP框架，基于 MoE 路由器早期收敛建立子空间基，将适应过程分为两阶段：(1)子空间识别阶段通过基预扩展引入候选专家，实施子空间约束正则化将新任务梯度隐式投影到历史子空间，并利用路由概率作为梯度流指示器精确剪枝冗余维度；(2)正交子空间微调阶段固定结构基并移除正则化以快速拟合任务特定残差损失。
AI.result: 在MTIL基准上实现SOTA精度，训练效率显著提升，可训练参数平均减少42.7%，最终总参数相比同类方法减少86.9%。
AI.conclusion: iGSP将对齐共享问题重新诠释为低秩子空间中的优化轨迹重叠几何问题，通过隐式梯度投影有效平衡知识复用与任务特异性学习，为视觉-语言模型的持续高效适应提供了新范式。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses continual learning for vision-language models (VLMs), which is a general machine learning/MLOps methodology problem, completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics research profile focused on video generation, 3D human motion generation, and quality assessment of synthesized videos. Although VLMs are mentioned in both, this paper's application domain is "VLM continual learning for downstream task adaptation" - not "using VLMs for quality control of generated videos." The methods (MoE routers, gradient subspace projection, parameter-efficient fine-tuning) are aimed at solving catastrophic forgetting in multi-task learning, which has no connection to diffusion-based video generation, visual feature extraction for guidance, or 3D human motion synthesis. This is a core ML/NLP methodology paper masquerading under a similar keyword.

title: Beyond Mode Collapse: Distribution Matching for Diverse Reasoning
summary: On-policy reinforcement learning methods like GRPO suffer from mode collapse: they exhibit reduced solution diversity, concentrating probability mass on a single solution once discovered and ceasing exploration of alternative strategies. We show this stems from reverse KL minimization's mode-seeking behavior, which reinforces the first high-reward trajectory found rather than maintaining a distribution over multiple diverse solutions. We propose DMPO (Distribution-Matching Policy Optimization), which prevents mode collapse through principled approximation of forward KL minimization. DMPO constructs a group level target distribution over sampled trajectories proportional to their rewards, then aligns the policy distribution to this target. This provides mode-covering behavior without requiring sampling from the intractable global target distribution, enabling sustained exploration throughout training. We validate DMPO on NP-hard combinatorial optimization, where exponentially many feasible solutions exist but only a few approach optimality, an ideal testbed for evaluating exploration. DMPO achieves 43.9% Quality Ratio on text-based NP-Bench (vs. GRPO's 40.1%) and 43.1% on vision-based NP-Bench (vs. 38.4%), demonstrating 9% and 12% relative improvements respectively. These gains generalize to mathematical reasoning (+2.0%) and out-of-domain tasks (+2.3%), showing that diversity-preserving training enhances general reasoning capabilities across modalities. Our work establishes distribution matching as a practical, principled approach to preventing mode collapse in on-policy RL, with consistent quality improvements demonstrating sustained exploration across diverse reasoning tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DMPO（分布匹配策略优化）方法，通过前向KL散度的原则性近似来防止强化学习中的模式崩溃问题，在NP难组合优化任务上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 当前基于GRPO等策略的强化学习方法存在模式崩溃问题，一旦发现高回报轨迹就会停止探索，导致解的多样性降低。这是因为反向KL最小化具有寻求模式的特性，倾向于强化单一高回报解而不是维持多个多样化解的分布。
AI.method: DMPO通过构建组级目标分布来近似前向KL散度。具体而言：对采样的轨迹按照其回报进行加权构建目标分布，然后使策略分布与该目标分布对齐。这种方法无需从难以处理的全局目标分布中采样，实现了训练过程中的持续探索。
AI.result: 在NP难组合优化基准测试中，DMPO在文本NP-Bench上达到43.9%的质量比（GRPO为40.1%），在视觉NP-Bench上达到43.1%（GRPO为38.4%），分别实现9%和12%的相对提升。此外，在数学推理任务上提升2.0%，域外任务上提升2.3%，表明多样性保持的训练增强了跨模态的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了分布匹配是防止on-policy RL中模式崩溃的实用且原则性的方法，通过持续探索在各种推理任务上带来一致的质量提升。DMPO作为前向KL散度的有效近似，为强化学习的探索提供了新的理论基础和实践方法。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses mode collapse in reinforcement learning for LLM reasoning tasks (text/visual NP-Bench benchmarks), which is completely unrelated to the research profile focused on Computer Graphics for 3D human motion generation. The application domain is entirely different - this paper deals with combinatorial optimization and mathematical reasoning in LLMs, not video generation, motion synthesis, or any computer graphics domain. While both profiles involve "distribution matching," the contexts are fundamentally different: RL training for language models vs. diffusion-based video/motion generation.

title: MMGS: 10$\times$ Compressed 3DGS through Optimal Transport Aggregation based on Multi-view Ranking
summary: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized 3D reconstruction, it suffers from significant overhead due to massive redundant primitives. Existing compression methods typically rely on local sampling or fixed pruning thresholds, which often struggle to balance redundancy reduction with high-fidelity rendering. To address this, we propose a novel framework that formulates Gaussian optimization as a global geometric distribution matching problem. Specifically, our approach integrates three components: (1) we introduce a multi-view 3D Gaussian contribution ranking mechanism that filters primitives using geometric consistency instead of local heuristics; (2) we propose a global Optimal Transport (OT)-based aggregation algorithm that merges redundant primitives while preserving the underlying geometry; and (3) we design an OT-based densification operator that maintains the Gaussian's distributional properties for stable optimization. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art rendering quality with only \textbf{10$\%$} primitives and \textbf{10$\times$} accelerated training speeds compared to vanilla 3DGS.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种将3D高斯优化问题形式化为全局几何分布匹配的新框架，通过多视图贡献排序、OT聚合和OT密集化三个组件，实现了仅用10%基元达到SOTA渲染质量，训练速度提升10倍。
AI.motivation: 3DGS存在大量冗余基元导致显著开销，现有压缩方法依赖局部采样或固定剪枝阈值，难以在冗余减少与高质量渲染间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出全局几何分布匹配框架，包含三组件：(1)多视图3D高斯贡献排序机制，使用几何一致性过滤基元；(2)基于全局最优传输(OT)的聚合算法，合并冗余基元同时保留几何；(3)OT密集化算子，保持高斯分布属性以实现稳定优化。
AI.result: 仅用10%基元达到SOTA渲染质量，训练速度比vanilla 3DGS加速10倍。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过将高斯优化重新定义为全局几何分布匹配问题，有效解决了3DGS的冗余压缩难题，在保持渲染质量的同时大幅降低了基元数量和训练开销。

relevance_reason: While both papers are in Computer Graphics, the application domains are fundamentally different. The research profile focuses on video generation, VLM-based quality assessment, and 3D human motion synthesis, while this paper addresses 3D Gaussian Splatting compression for scene rendering. The methods also differ significantly - the profile uses diffusion-based video models and VLMs, whereas this paper uses Optimal Transport for 3DGS aggregation. Although 3DGS is a 3D representation technique, it serves rendering/compression needs rather than motion generation or video synthesis. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points around video quality control, 2D-to-3D motion bridging, or temporal consistency in human motions.

title: Attention-Guided Reward for Reinforcement Learning-based Jailbreak against Large Reasoning Models
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in solving complex problems by generating structured, step-by-step reasoning content. However, exposing a model's internal reasoning process introduces additional safety risks; for example, recent studies show that LRMs are more vulnerable to jailbreak attacks than standard LLMs. In this paper, we investigate jailbreak attacks on LRMs and reveal that the attack success rate (ASR) is closely correlated with LRMs' attention patterns. Specifically, successful jailbreaks tend to assign lower attention to harmful tokens in the input prompt, while allocating higher attention to those tokens in the reasoning content. Motivated by this finding, we propose a novel jailbreak method for LRMs that leverages reinforcement learning (RL) to enhance attack effectiveness, explicitly incorporating attention signals into the reward function design. In addition, we introduce diverse persuasion strategies to enrich the RL action space, which consistently improves the ASR. Extensive experiments on five open-source and closed-source LRMs across three benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves substantially higher ASR, outperforming existing approaches in terms of effectiveness, efficiency, and transferability.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大型推理模型(LRMs)面临的越狱攻击问题,发现攻击成功率与注意力模式密切相关,并提出一种基于强化学习的新型越狱方法,通过在奖励函数中融入注意力信号来增强攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型在生成结构化推理内容方面表现出色,但暴露内部推理过程会引入安全风险。研究表明LRMs比标准LLMs更容易受到越狱攻击,因此需要深入理解其脆弱性机制。
AI.method: 1)分析越狱攻击与LRMs注意力模式的相关性;2)提出基于强化学习的越狱方法,将注意力信号纳入奖励函数设计;3)引入多样化的说服策略来丰富RL动作空间。
AI.result: 在5个开源和闭源LRMs上进行了三大基准测试,实验表明该方法在攻击成功率、效率和可迁移性方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 成功越狱往往表现为对输入中有害token分配较低注意力,而对推理内容中的token分配较高注意力。提出的RL方法通过显式利用注意力信号能更有效地实施越狱攻击,为LRMs的安全评估提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about adversarial machine learning/security (jailbreak attacks against large reasoning models), which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics research profile focused on video generation and 3D human motion synthesis. The application domains are entirely different - one deals with generating visual content (graphics/animation), while the other deals with attacking language models. Even though both fields may use deep learning, the goals, methods, and practical applications have no intersection.

title: MetaRA: Metamorphic Robustness Assessment for Multimodal Large Language Model-based Visual Question Answering Systems
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA), as the representative multimodal task, serves as a key benchmark for evaluating the reasoning capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, existing evaluations largely rely on static datasets and accuracy-based metrics, which fail to capture robustness, consistency, and generalization. Inspired by Metamorphic Testing (MT), we propose Metamorphic Robustness Assessment (MetaRA), a testing framework that employs Metamorphic Relations (MRs) to systematically probe vulnerabilities in MLLM-based VQA systems. MetaRA generates controlled variations of image-question inputs based on specific MRs and evaluates models across diverse conditions. Applying MetaRA to multiple MLLM-based VQA models across different tasks reveals nuanced failure patterns, including sensitivity to linguistic perturbations, over-reliance on superficial visual cues, and deeper weaknesses in multimodal reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that MetaRA provides richer diagnostic insights than conventional accuracy metrics, exposing failure modes that remain hidden under standard benchmarks. Overall, this work highlights the need for systematic robustness evaluation in VQA and positions metamorphic assessment as a scalable, model-agnostic approach toward trustworthy multimodal AI.

AI.tldr: 论文提出MetaRA框架，将元形态测试概念应用于多模态大语言模型的视觉问答任务评估，通过生成受控的输入变体来系统性探测模型漏洞。实验证明该方法能揭示传统准确率指标无法发现的多种失败模式，为可信赖的多模态AI评估提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 现有评估方法主要依赖静态数据集和基于准确率的指标，无法捕捉模型的鲁棒性、一致性和泛化能力。这些传统的评估方式存在局限性，难以全面发现多模态大语言模型在VQA任务中的潜在缺陷。
AI.method: 提出元形态鲁棒性评估(MetaRA)框架，采用元形态关系(MRs)来系统性地探测基于多模态大语言模型的VQA系统的漏洞。MetaRA根据特定的MRs生成受控的图像-问题输入变体，并在不同条件下评估多个模型。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，MetaRA比传统准确率指标提供了更丰富的诊断洞察，成功揭示了多种细微的失败模式，包括：对语言扰动的敏感性、对浅层视觉线索的过度依赖，以及多模态推理能力的深层弱点。这些失败模式在标准基准测试中往往被隐藏。
AI.conclusion: MetaRA框架作为一种可扩展的、与模型无关的方法，能够揭示传统基准测试中隐藏的失败模式，为可信赖的多模态AI评估提供了新的思路。该方法不仅能识别语言扰动的敏感性，还能发现模型对浅层视觉线索的过度依赖以及多模态推理的深层弱点。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses a fundamentally different application domain. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics - specifically video generation and 3D human motion synthesis using diffusion models. The paper however focuses on Visual Question Answering (VQA) - a Computer Vision task about understanding and answering questions about images. While both mention "Vision Language Models," they use them for completely different purposes: the profile needs VLMs for quality assessment of generated videos/motions, while this paper uses MLLMs for VQA. VQA is about analyzing existing visual content, not generating or evaluating synthesized content. Additionally, the paper does not address any of the four pain points: it doesn't deal with video generation quality control, 2D-to-3D motion bridging, or temporal consistency. This is a computer vision/AI evaluation paper, not a computer graphics generation paper.

title: Position: The Turing-Completeness of Real-World Autoregressive Transformers Relies Heavily on Context Management
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 Position Paper Track
summary: Many works make the eye-catching claim that Transformers are Turing-complete. However, the literature often conflates two distinct settings: (i) a fixed Transformer system setting, in which a fixed autoregressive Transformer is coupled with a fixed context-management method to process inputs of different lengths step by step, and (ii) a scaling-family setting, in which a family of different models (with increasing context-window length or numerical precision) is used to handle different input lengths. Existing proofs of Transformer Turing-completeness are frequently established in setting (ii), whereas real-world LLM deployment and the standard notion of Turing-completeness correspond more naturally to setting (i). In this paper, we first formalize the fixed-system setting, thereby providing a concrete characterization of how real-world LLMs operate. We then argue that results proved in the scaling-family setting provide theoretically meaningful resource bounds but do not establish Turing-completeness, thereby clarifying a common misinterpretation of existing results. Finally, we show that different context-management methods can yield sharply different computational power, and we advocate the position that context management is a central component that critically determines the computational power of real-world autoregressive Transformers.

AI.tldr: 本文澄清了关于Transformer图灵完备性的常见误解，区分了两种设置：固定系统设置（单个固定模型处理不同长度输入）和缩放族设置（模型家族随上下文窗口增长）。作者指出现有证明多在缩放族设置中成立，但实际LLM部署对应的是固定系统设置，因此这些证明未能真正确立图灵完备性。
AI.motivation: 当前文献常宣称Transformer是图灵完备的，但忽视了两种设置的根本差异。固定系统设置更符合真实世界LLM的实际运作方式，而现有证明往往建立在缩放族设置上，这导致了概念上的混淆和误导。
AI.method: 首先形式化固定系统设置，提供具体表征；然后分析比较两种设置的理论差异；最后探讨不同上下文管理方法对计算能力的 影响。
AI.result: 明确了固定系统设置与缩放族设置的根本区别；揭示了现有在缩放族设置中的图灵完备性证明并不适用于真实世界的LLM部署；表明上下文管理方法是决定Transformer计算能力的关键组件。
AI.conclusion: 图灵完备性的验证需在固定系统设置下进行才有实际意义；上下文管理方法应当被视为确定真实世界自回归Transformer计算能力的重要因素，而非可忽略的技术细节。

relevance_reason: This paper is about theoretical computer science - specifically analyzing whether Transformer architectures (in the context of Large Language Models) are Turing complete. It discusses computational theory concepts like fixed system settings vs scaling family settings. This is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics, specifically: (1) Diffusion-based video generation (e.g., Wanxiang, Seedance), (2) Vision Language Models for quality assessment of generated videos, (3) 3D human motion generation, (4) Visual feature extraction from synthesized videos, and (5) Cross-modal learning pipelines. Even though both mention "Transformers," they refer to entirely different things - the paper is about LLM architectures while the research profile needs Transformers for visual/video synthesis. There is zero application domain overlap.

title: SWEET: Sparse World Modeling with Image Editing for Embodied Task Execution
summary: Visual prediction has emerged as a promising paradigm for embodied control, where future observations are generated and then translated into actions. However, dense video generation is computationally expensive and often unnecessary for many manipulation tasks, whose progress can be summarized by a small number of task-relevant visual states. In this work, we study whether image editing models can serve as sparse visual world models for robot manipulation by predicting task-level future states without dense video rollout. We first conduct a controlled comparison between the video generation model Wan2.2 and the image editing model FLUX-Kontext under the same robotic data setting, and find that image editing produces more reliable task-level keyframes with better visual fidelity and substantially lower inference cost. Motivated by this observation, we propose SWEET, a one-shot sparse visual planning framework that progressively generates a sequence of task-relevant manipulation keyframes through successive image editing, conditioned on language instructions and optional arrow-based spatial guidance. A goal-conditioned diffusion action predictor then converts adjacent imagined keyframes into executable action chunks. To reduce the mismatch between real and edited visual subgoals, we further introduce a mixed-training strategy with filtered edited targets. Experiments on DROID and RoboMimic show that SWEET improves keyframe prediction across seen and unseen scenes and enables a full pipeline from sequential keyframe planning to executable robot actions, suggesting that image editing is a promising and underexplored direction for embodied visual prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SWEET框架,创新性地将图像编辑模型作为稀疏视觉世界模型替代传统视频生成方法,通过逐步生成任务相关关键帧来实现机器人操纵的视觉规划,并结合扩散动作预测器将想象的关键帧转换为可执行动作。
AI.motivation: 密集视频生成本身计算昂贵,且对于许多操纵任务来说并不必要,因为任务进展可以用少量任务相关的视觉状态(summary)来描述。之前没有人系统研究过图像编辑模型是否可以作为稀疏视觉世界模型用于机器人操纵。
AI.method: 1)首先在相同机器人数据设置下对比视频生成模型Wan2.2与图像编辑模型FLUX-Kontext;2)提出SWEET框架,通过连续图像编辑逐步生成任务相关操纵关键帧,以语言指令和可选的箭头式空间引导为条件;3)使用目标条件扩散动作预测器将相邻想象关键帧转换为可执行动作块;4)引入混合训练策略,通过过滤编辑目标减少真实与编辑视觉子目标之间的不匹配。
AI.result: 实验在DROID和RoboMimic数据集上表明:1)图像编辑比视频生成产生更可靠的任务级关键帧,具有更好的视觉保真度且推理成本显著降低;2)SWEET在可见和未见场景下改善了关键帧预测;3)实现了从顺序关键帧规划到可执行机器人动作的完整pipeline。
AI.conclusion: 图像编辑是一个有前景但尚未充分探索的嵌入式视觉预测方向,为机器人操纵中的稀疏视觉世界建模提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about ROBOTICS manipulation (embodied AI), not Computer Graphics video/human motion generation. While it uses diffusion models, the application domain is fundamentally different - it's about robot task execution and action prediction rather than video synthesis or 3D human motion generation. The paper doesn't address any of the specified pain points (visual feature extraction from synthesized videos, VLM quality control, bridging 2D-3D domain gap for human motion, temporal consistency in human motions). Robot motion generation is a different application from human motion generation.

title: BLINKG: A Benchmark for LLM-Integrated Knowledge Graph Generation
summary: Generating Knowledge Graphs (KGs) remains one of the most time-consuming and labor-intensive tasks for knowledge engineers, as they need to identify semantic equivalences between input data sources and ontology terms. While declarative solutions (e.g., RML, SPARQL-Anything) have helped to generalize this process, aligning input schema elements with ontology terms still involves intricate transformations and requires considerable manual effort. With the advent of Large Language Models (LLMs), there is growing interest in leveraging their capabilities to assist KG engineers. Although some studies have explored using LLMs to automate KG construction, there is still no standardized framework for assessing how effectively they establish correspondences between data schemes and ontology concepts. Therefore, in this paper, we propose BLINKG, a benchmark designed to evaluate the mapping capabilities of LLMs in constructing KGs from heterogeneous data sources. The benchmark includes a set of scenarios with increasing complexity, based on real-world use cases. We conduct an extensive experimental evaluation of several stateof-the-art LLMs using BLINK and observe that they already offer promising solutions. However, their performance remains limited in complex scenarios. Thanks to this benchmark, we can already assess the current capabilities of LLMs for KG construction. Additionally, we define a set of requirements for achieving (semi)automated (LLM-driven) KG construction, opening new research lines in this area.

AI.tldr: BLINKG是一个用于评估LLM从异构数据源构建知识图谱映射能力的基准测试，包含基于真实用例的复杂程度递增的场景，并对多个先进LLM进行了广泛评估，发现它们在简单场景下表现良好但复杂场景仍有局限。
AI.motivation: 当前生成知识图谱仍需大量人工工作，虽然LLM引起了研究兴趣，但尚无标准框架来评估它们在数据模式与本体概念之间建立对应关系的有效性。
AI.method: 设计了一套基于真实用例的复杂程度递增的测试场景，对多个最先进的LLM进行了广泛的实验评估。
AI.result: LLM已显示出不错的解决方案，但在复杂场景下表现仍有局限。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了BLINKG基准，为评估LLM在知识图谱构建中的映射能力提供了标准化框架，定义了实现半自动化KG构建的要求，为该领域开辟了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Knowledge Graph generation using LLMs, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics. The field (Knowledge Graphs/LLMs), application domain (KG mapping from heterogeneous data), and methods (LLM evaluation for schema-concept mapping) have no connection to the research profile which focuses on diffusion-based video generation, 3D human motion synthesis, and VLM for quality assessment in computer graphics. There is no overlap in pain points or methods.

title: TextAlign: Preference Alignment for Text Rendering with Hierarchical Rewards
summary: Faithful text rendering remains a persistent weakness of large text-to-image generative models, as it requires both semantic instruction following and fine-grained glyph-level structure. Prior methods often improve this ability through architecture-specific modules or encoder modifications, which complicate deployment across foundation models. We study text rendering as a post-training preference-alignment problem and propose TextAlign, a non-invasive framework that keeps the generator architecture unchanged. The key component is a hierarchical vision-language model (VLM)-based reward that decomposes rendering errors into global, word, and glyph levels, then converts binary defect judgments into a scalar preference signal. The resulting signal supports both Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) and Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). Experiments on FLUX.1-dev and Z-Image-Turbo show consistent gains in OCR-based text accuracy without degrading general generation quality. Compared with strong foundation and text-rendering baselines, including SD3.5, Qwen-Image, AnyText, and TextDiffuser, these results indicate that reward design offers a scalable alternative to model redesign for improving text rendering.

AI.tldr: 本文将文本渲染问题重新定义为后训练偏好对齐任务，提出TextAlign框架，利用分层VLM将渲染错误分解为多层次并生成偏好信号以支持GRPO/DPO优化，在多个模型上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 大型文生图模型在文字渲染方面存在持久弱点，需要同时遵循语义指令和精细的字形结构。现有的方法通常通过架构特定的模块或编码器修改来改进，但这使得在不同基础模型上部署变得复杂。
AI.method: 提出TextAlign，一种非侵入性框架，保持生成器架构不变。核心组件是基于分层视觉语言模型(VLM)的奖励，将渲染错误分解为全局、单词和字形级别，然后，将二进制缺陷判断转换为标量偏好信号。该信号支持_GROUP Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）和Direct Preference Optimization（DPO）。
AI.result: 在FLUX.1-dev和Z-Image-Turbo上的实验表明，OCR文本准确性持续提升，且不损害整体生成质量。与包括SD3.5、Qwen-Image、AnyText和TextDiffuser在内的强大基线模型相比，该方法显示了奖励设计作为模型重新设计的可扩展替代方案的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 通过将文本渲染视为偏好对齐问题而非架构改造问题，提供了一种通用且可扩展的解决方案。分层VLM奖励设计能够有效捕捉不同粒度的渲染错误，GRPO和DPO两种优化策略均适用，且无需修改基础模型架构，具备良好的可迁移性。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on text rendering quality in IMAGE generation (text-to-image), completely unrelated to the research profile which deals with VIDEO generation quality control and 3D human motion synthesis. While both use VLM, the application domain is entirely different - text rendering in static images vs video/VLM quality assessment for video/3D motion generation.

title: Efficient Elicitation of Collective Disagreements
summary: We analyze the structure of the disagreement among a population of voters over a set of alternatives. Surveys typically ask either for pairwise comparisons, simple and intuitive for participants, or full rankings over alternatives, eliciting the entire voters' preferences. Building on the observation that pairwise comparisons cannot distinguish structural disagreement from noise, we propose a stratified framework to identify the minimal aggregated preference information needed to compute a number of disagreement measures from the literature. Specifically, we introduce the plurality matrix, a generalization of pairwise comparisons that records, for every subset $S$ of alternatives, the probability that each $a \in S$ ranks first in $S$. We define the level of a disagreement measure as the smallest subset size needed to express it, showing that many existing notions, including rank-variance and divisiveness, sit at level $3$, proving that pairwise comparisons are not enough. In addition, we demonstrate the interest of going beyond level $3$ both theoretically and experimentally. To make these results actionable, we design two elicitation protocols to estimate the plurality matrix, exploring the trade-off between the number of required participants and the cognitive load requested to each of them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的 pluralism matrix 框架来解决选民偏好分歧测量问题。研究发现传统成对比较方法不足，需三元组才能准确表达多个重要分歧测度（如rank-variance、divisiveness等）。通过定义分歧测度的层级概念，证明多数现有方法位于第三层级，并设计了两个数据收集协议实现更优的偏好诱导。
AI.motivation: 现有调查方法中，成对比较无法区分结构化分歧和噪声，而完整排名虽然能获取全部偏好信息但对参与者认知负担较重。文章旨在解决如何在最少的偏好信息下有效测量选民之间的分歧程度。
AI.method: 研究采用了分层框架分析方法，引入plurality matrix（多数矩阵），定义分歧测度的层级为表达该测度所需的最小子集大小。通过数学推导证明多个现有分歧概念（包括排名方差和分裂度）位于第三层级，并通过理论分析和实验验证超越第三层级的可能性和价值。设计了两个诱导协议来估计plurality matrix，平衡参与人数和认知负荷。
AI.result: 研究结果显示：1）成对比较不足以表达许多重要的分歧测度；2）多项现有分歧概念（包括rank-variance和divisiveness）位于第三层级，需要三元组而非成对比较才能准确表达；3）超越第三层级的分析具有理论和实验价值；4）设计了两种有效的elicitation协议，可以在减少参与者数量和降低认知负荷之间取得平衡。
AI.conclusion: 本研究的结论是现有成对比较方法不足以捕捉完整的偏好分歧结构，通过plurality matrix框架可以更准确地表达和测量选民之间的分歧程度。实验证明超越第三层级的分析在理论和实践上都有重要价值，同时设计了两个诱导协议来估计plurality matrix，为实际应用提供了可行的数据收集方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about political science/survey methodology - measuring voter preference disagreements using a "pluralism matrix" framework and triplet comparisons. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics. The application domain is completely different: this is about voter preference measurement, while the research profile is about video generation, 3D human motion generation, VLM-based quality assessment, and temporal consistency in synthesized visuals. The methods used are entirely different (mathematical framework for disagreement measures vs diffusion models, VLMs, and cross-modal learning pipelines). No connection to any of the pain points or methods in the research profile.

title: DynaTok: Temporally Adaptive and Positional Bias-Aware Token Compression for Video-LLMs
summary: Recent advances in Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have greatly expanded multimodal reasoning capabilities. However, the massive number of visual tokens extracted from long video sequences incurs prohibitive computational costs, limiting their deployment in real-world scenarios. Existing training-free token compression methods select tokens based on attention magnitude as a proxy for semantic importance, but often overlook positional bias and rely only on short-term temporal locality, leading to redundant spatio-temporal coverage and inefficient token usage. We present DynaTok, a training-free, temporally adaptive and bias-aware token compression framework that allocates token budgets across both temporal and spatial dimensions. Through a lightweight exponential moving average (EMA) memory, the Temporal Budget Allocation (TBA) module dynamically assigns fewer tokens to redundant frames and more to novel frames, capturing long-term temporal variation. The Spatial Budget Allocation (SBA) module complements this by selecting spatially diverse and semantically important features using activation-based attention maps, while leveraging a spatial memory to reduce redundancy from previously selected regions and mitigate positional bias. DynaTok integrates seamlessly with existing Video-LLMs such as LLaVA-OneVision and LLaVA-Video without retraining, and effectively preserves semantic coverage under aggressive compression. Experiments on four representative VideoQA benchmarks-MVBench, LongVideoBench, MLVU, and VideoMME-show that DynaTok retains over 95% of baseline accuracy even with a 90% token reduction, surpassing recent training-free approaches. These results demonstrate that DynaTok provides a principled foundation for efficient and robust video reasoning, paving the way toward real-time streaming video understanding with future Video-LLMs.

AI.tldr: DynaTok是一种无需训练的、时间自适应且偏置感知的视频语言模型token压缩框架,通过时序预算分配(TBA)和空间预算分配(SBA)模块,在保持超过95%基线准确率的同时实现90%的token削减。
AI.motivation: 现有Video-LLMs处理长视频序列时产生海量visual tokens,导致极高的计算成本。现有无训练token压缩方法仅基于注意力大小选择tokens,忽视位置偏差且仅考虑短期时序局部性,导致时空冗余覆盖和token使用效率低下。
AI.method: 提出DynaTok框架,包含两个核心模块:1)TBA通过轻量级指数移动平均(EMA)存储器动态分配token预算,给冗余帧分配更少tokens,给新颖帧分配更多tokens,捕捉长期时序变化;2)SBA使用激活式注意力图选择空间多样且语义重要的特征,利用空间存储器减少先前选中区域的冗余并缓解位置偏差。该框架可无缝集成到LLaVA-OneVision和LLAVA-Video等现有Video-LLMs中。
AI.result: 在四个代表性VideoQA基准(MVBench、LongVideoBench、MLVU、VideoMME)上的实验表明,DynaTok在90%token削减下仍保留超过95%的基线准确率,优于现有的无训练压缩方法。
AI.conclusion: DynaTok为高效且稳健的视频推理提供了原则性基础,为未来Video-LLMs实现实时流式视频理解铺平了道路。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses token compression for Video-Language Models (Video-LLMs) used in video understanding/QA tasks, which is a different application domain from the research profile focused on Computer Graphics, specifically 3D human motion synthesis and video generation. While both deal with videos conceptually, this paper is about高效 inference in multimodal LLMs for question-answering, not about generating 3D human motions or quality control of synthesized videos. The pain points in the profile (bridging 2D video priors to 3D human motion, temporal consistency in synthesized 3D motions) are completely unaddressed. Using similar concepts of "video tokens" doesn't make this relevant - it's solving a completely different problem in NLP/multimodal ML rather than computer graphics motion generation.

title: Generative-Evaluative Agreement: A Necessary Validity Criterion for LLM-Enabled Adaptive Assessment
summary: When the same LLM generates assessment items, simulates student responses, and scores them, the validation loop is self-referential. We introduce Generative-Evaluative Agreement (GEA), a validity criterion measuring whether an LLM's scoring function recovers the skill levels its generative function was instructed to produce. In the first direct measurement of GEA on a two-stage adaptive assessment, the model recovers roughly half the intended variance r = 0.698 with systematic positive bias. GEA is strong r > 0.7 for syntactically verifiable skills but near zero for design-level skills, and low-skill overestimation inflates scores near the routing threshold. We argue that granular, skill-decomposed rubrics are the principal proposed mechanism for strengthening GEA and outline complementary mitigations.

AI.tldr: 本文引入生成-评估一致性(GEA)作为LLM评估的新有效性标准，用于衡量LLM的评分功能是否能恢复其生成功能被要求呈现的技能水平。在对两阶段自适应评估的首次直接测量中，模型恢复了约一半的预期方差(r=0.698)，存在系统性正偏差。GEA在句法可验证技能上表现强劲(r>0.7)，但在设计层面技能上接近为零，低技能高估会夸大路由阈值附近的分数。
AI.motivation: 当同一LLM生成评选项、模拟学生响应并对其进行评分时，验证循环变成自我指涉的。传统评估有效性理论假设生成和评分是独立函数，但LLM可能模糊这一界限，需要新的有效性衡量标准来检测这种系统性偏差。
AI.method: 在两阶段自适应评估上进行GEA的直接测量，使用LLM的生成功能产生不同技能水平的项目，评分功能对这些响应进行评分，然后检验评分是否恢复到预期的技能方差。
AI.result: 模型仅恢复了约一半的预期方差(r=0.698)，且存在系统性的正偏差。对于句法可验证技能，GEA较强(r>0.7)；但对于设计层面技能，GEA接近零。低技能高估导致在路由阈值附近的分数被夸大。
AI.conclusion: 建议采用granular, skill-decomposed rubrics（细粒度、技能分解的评分规则）作为加强GEA的主要机制，并概述了补充性缓解措施。这是首次对LLM自生成评估中自我指涉问题的直接测量，为AI辅助评估的有效性研究提供了新框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is entirely in the domain of educational assessment with LLMs, not Computer Graphics. It discusses using LLMs for generating and evaluating test items in adaptive assessment scenarios, focusing on measurement validity in educational testing. There is NO connection to: (1) Diffusion-based video generation, (2) 3D human motion generation, (3) Vision-Language Models for visual quality assessment, (4) Temporal consistency in synthesized motions, (5) Cross-modal learning between 2D video and 3D motion. While the paper mentions VLMs and evaluation, it is in the context of language-based educational assessment, not visual/video quality assessment in computer graphics. Completely different field and application domain.

title: RE-VLM: Event-Augmented Vision-Language Model for Scene Understanding
summary: Conventional vision-language models (VLMs) struggle to interpret scenes captured under adverse conditions (e.g., low light, high dynamic range, or fast motion) because standard RGB images degrade in such environments. Event cameras provide a complementary modality: they asynchronously record per-pixel brightness changes with high temporal resolution and wide dynamic range, preserving motion cues where frames fail. We propose RE-VLM, the first dual-stream vision-language model that jointly leverages RGB images and event streams for robust scene understanding across both normal and challenging conditions. RE-VLM employs parallel RGB and event encoders together with a progressive training strategy that aligns heterogeneous visual features with language. To address the scarcity of RGB-Event-Text supervision, we further propose a graph-driven pipeline that converts synchronized RGB-Event streams into verifiable scene graphs, from which we synthesize captions and question-answer (QA) pairs. To develop and evaluate RE-VLM, we construct two datasets: PEOD-Chat, targeting illumination-challenged scenes, and RGBE-Chat, covering diverse scenarios. On captioning and VQA benchmarks, RE-VLM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art RGB-only and event-only models with comparable parameter counts, with particularly large gains under challenging conditions. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of event-augmented VLMs in achieving robust vision-language understanding across a wide range of real-world environments. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/bupt-ai-cz/RE-VLM.

AI.tldr: RE-VLM是首个双流视觉语言模型，联合利用RGB图像和事件流进行鲁棒的场景理解。通过并行RGB和事件编码器以及渐进式训练策略，在光照挑战条件下显著优于现有的RGB-only和事件-only模型。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉语言模型在低光、高动态范围或快速运动等不利条件下表现不佳，因为标准RGB图像在此类环境中会退化。事件相机提供了一种互补模态，能够以高时间分辨率和宽动态范围异步记录每像素亮度变化。
AI.method: 提出RE-VLM双流视觉语言模型，采用并行RGB和事件编码器，结合渐进式训练策略对齐异构视觉特征与语言。为解决RGB-事件-文本监督数据稀缺问题，提出图驱动管道将同步的RGB-事件流转换为可验证的场景图，从中合成字幕和问答对。
AI.result: 构建了两个数据集：PEOD-Chat（针对光照挑战场景）和RGBE-Chat（覆盖多样化场景）。在字幕生成和VQA基准测试中，RE-VLM始终优于参数量相当的SOTA RGB-only和事件-only模型，在挑战性条件下获得尤其显著的提升。
AI.conclusion: 事件增强的VLMs能够在各种真实世界环境中实现鲁棒的视觉语言理解，为多模态感知提供了有效途径。

relevance_reason: The application domains are fundamentally different. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics: specifically synthesizing videos/images and 3D human motions, along with quality assessment for GENERATED content. RE-VLM is about scene understanding for robotics/autonomous systems using event cameras to handle challenging lighting conditions - it's analyzing REAL-WORLD scenes, not evaluating synthesized/generated content. While both use Vision-Language Models, the purpose is entirely different: one is for quality control of generated content in graphics pipelines, the other is for robust scene perception in robotics. Additionally, RE-VLM doesn't address any of the specific pain points like extracting features from synthesized outputs, bridging 2D video priors to 3D human motion, or ensuring temporal consistency in synthesized motions.

title: Library Drift: Diagnosing and Fixing a Silent Failure Mode in Self-Evolving LLM Skill Libraries
summary: Self-evolving skill libraries face a silent failure mode we term \emph{library drift}: unbounded skill accumulation without outcome-driven lifecycle management causes retrieval degradation, false-positive injections, and performance stagnation. Recent evaluation confirms the symptom--LLM-authored skills deliver +0.0pp gain while human-curated ones deliver +16.2pp (SkillsBench)--yet the underlying mechanism has not been isolated. We provide (1) a reproducible trigger: ablations that isolate drift--one disables skill injection (flat floor, +0.002), one imposes premature retirement (active harm, $-$0.019); (2) trace-level diagnostics: an append-only evidence log with per-skill contribution scores, attribution verdicts, and router engagement metrics that make the failure visible before it reaches end-task scores; and (3) a verified fix: a minimal governance recipe (outcome-driven retirement + bounded active-cap + meta-skill authoring prior) that lifts held-out pass@1 from a 0.258 baseline to a late-window mean of 0.584 (rolling gain $+$0.328) on MBPP+ hard-100 over 100 rounds. Eight ablations decompose which governance mechanisms are load-bearing and which are subsumed, providing a concrete playbook for diagnosing library drift in any self-evolving agent.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了自Evolution技能库中的一个关键失败模式——"库漂移"（library drift）：无限制的技能积累导致检索下降、误报注入和性能停滞。通过消融实验隔离了这一问题，并提出了包含结果驱动退休、边界主动cap和元技能创作先验的治理方案，在MBPP+ hard-100上将pass@1从0.258提升到0.584。
AI.motivation: 当前自Evolution技能库存在一个静默失败模式——库漂移，表现为无限制的技能积累但缺乏结果驱动的生命周期管理，导致检索退化、误报注入和性能停滞。已有评估显示LLM编写的技能为+0.0pp增益，而人工策划的技能为+16.2pp增益，但潜在机制尚未被分离出来。因此需要识别并解决这一根本问题。
AI.method: 通过三种主要方法进行研究：(1)消融实验——禁用技能注入（平面地板，+0.002）和强制过早退休（主动伤害，-0.019）来隔离漂移；(2)追踪级诊断——创建仅追加的证据日志，包含每技能贡献分数、归因判断和路由参与度指标，使失败在任务终分数之前可见；(3)验证修复——实施最小治理方案（结果驱动退休+边界主动cap+元技能创作先验），在100轮内监控性能变化。
AI.result: 治理方案将held-out pass@1从0.258基线提升到晚窗口均值0.584，滚动增益+0.328。八个消融实验分解了哪些治理机制是_load-bearing_（可承载的），哪些是被吸收的。最关键的发现是：无结果驱动退休会导致性能停滞，无边界cap会导致技能无限累积，元技能创作先验能有效引导新技能的生成。
AI.conclusion: 本文成功识别、诊断并修复了自Evolution技能库中的库漂移问题。通过可重现的触发器、追踪级诊断工具和经过验证的最小治理方案，为构建可靠的自Evolution智能体提供了具体的操作手册。未来工作可以探索如何自动检测漂移阈值，以及将治理方案扩展到其他类型的自修改系统。

relevance_reason: This paper is about self-evolving LLM skill libraries for CODE GENERATION (software engineering - MBPP+ hard benchmark), which is completely outside the Computer Graphics domain. While the research profile focuses on video generation, 3D human motion generation, and VLM-based quality assessment for graphics, this paper addresses governance issues in LLM-based programming skill systems. There is no application domain match - it's a different field entirely (software engineering vs computer graphics).

title: Selective, Regularized, and Calibrated: Harnessing Vision Foundation Models for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation
comment: 20 pages, 11 figures, 13 tables. Accepted to CVPR 2026
summary: Vision foundation models (VFMs) have achieved strong performance across various vision tasks. However, it still remains challenging to apply VFMs for cross-domain few-shot segmentation (CD-FSS), which segments objects of novel classes under domain shifts using only a few labeled exemplars. The challenge is mainly driven by two factors: (1) limited labeled exemplars per novel class relative to the scale of VFM pre-training, making the model prone to overfitting during retraining, and (2) target-domain shifts underrepresented during pre-training, inducing cross-domain inconsistency and layer-wise sensitivity. To address these issues, we propose Hierarchical Exemplar Representation Adaptation (HERA), a three-stage select-regularize-calibrate VFM-based segmentation framework that learns effectively from limited labels and adapts to novel domains without source-data retraining. We first design Hierarchical Layer Selection (HLS) to adaptively identify the most informative VFM layer using a data-dependent Exemplar Transfer Risk (ETR) computed for each candidate layer. Then, Prior-Guided Regularization (PGR) regularizes interactions on the selected representation, yielding well-structured local signals for the subsequent stage. Furthermore, Pixelwise Adaptive Calibration (PAC) combines the selected representation with the refined interaction maps to calibrate pixel-wise predictions, producing consistent masks. Together, these stages form a hierarchical select-regularize-calibrate pipeline that guides frozen VFM features in new domains while fine-tuning less than 2.7% of parameters at test time. Extensive experiments show that HERA surpasses the state of the art by more than 4.1 mIoU across multiple CD-FSS benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文针对跨域小样本分割(CD-FSS)任务提出HERA框架，利用视觉基础模型(VFM)处理领域偏移下的新类别分割问题。该方法通过三层选择-正则-校准pipeline：层次化层选择(HLS)使用示例迁移风险(ETR)自适应选择最优VFM层；先验引导正则化(PGR)正则化选定表示的交互；像素级自适应校准(PAC)结合选定表示与精炼交互图进行像素预测校准。方法在测试时仅微调不到2.7%的参数，在多个CD-FSS基准上超越SOTA超过4.1mIoU。
AI.motivation: 跨域小样本分割面临两大核心挑战：(1)新类别标注样本有限，相较于VFM预训练规模而言极易过拟合；(2)目标领域偏移在预训练中未被充分覆盖，导致跨域不一致性和层间敏感性。当前方法难以有效利用冻结VFM特征且适应新领域。
AI.method: 提出Hierarchical Exemplar Representation Adaptation (HERA)框架，包含三个阶段： (1)层次化层选择(HLS)：设计数据依赖的示例迁移风险(ETR)计算每个候选层的可迁移性，自适应识别最具信息量的VFM层； (2)先验引导正则化(PGR)：对选定表示的交互进行正则化，产生结构化的局部信号； (3)像素级自适应校准(PAC)：将选定表示与精炼交互图结合，校准像素级预测生成一致掩膜。三阶段形成层次化选择-正则-校准pipeline，在新领域引导冻结VFM特征，测试时微调参数少于2.7%。
AI.result: 在多个CD-FSS基准数据集上进行了广泛实验，HERA方法超越了当前最先进方法超过4.1 mIoU。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的HERA框架成功解决了跨域小样本分割中标注样本有限和领域偏移带来的挑战。通过三层select-regularize-calibrate pipeline设计，实现了仅微调少量参数即可有效适应新领域，为基于VFM的少样本学习提供了新的有效范式。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Cross-Domain Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation (CD-FSS) - segmenting objects in images with limited samples across different domains. This is fundamentally different from the research profile's focus on (1) Diffusion-based Video Generation, (2) 3D Human Motion Synthesis, and (3) Quality assessment of generated videos using VLMs. While both papers use Vision Foundation Models, the application domain is completely different - semantic segmentation vs. video/motion generation. The "cross-domain" aspect in the paper refers to domain shift in image segmentation, not bridging 2D video priors to 3D human motion.

title: SceneCode: Executable World Programs for Editable Indoor Scenes with Articulated Objects
summary: Indoor scene synthesis underpins embodied AI, robotic manipulation, and simulation-based policy evaluation, where a useful scene must specify not only what the environment looks like, but also how its objects are structured. Existing pipelines, however, typically represent generated content as static meshes and inherit articulation only from curated asset libraries, which limits object-level controllability and prevents new interactable assets from being produced on demand. We address this gap by formulating physically interactable indoor scene synthesis as programmatic world generation, and present SceneCode, a framework that compiles a natural language prompt into an executable, code-driven indoor world rather than a collection of opaque meshes. A room-level agentic backbone first turns the prompt into a structured house layout and emits per-object AssetRequests through a planner--designer--critic loop. Each request is then routed to one of five code-generation strategies and converted into a synthesized part-wise Blender Python programs that are validated through an execution-guided repair-and-refine loop. The resulting programs are compiled into simulation-ready assets, and exported as SDF for physics simulation. A persistent scene-state registry links object requests, executable programs, rendered geometry, and simulation assets, turning scene assembly into a traceable and locally editable world-building process. We evaluate SceneCode across scene-level synthesis, object-level asset quality, human judgment, and downstream robot interaction. Results show that executable world programs improve prompt-faithful indoor scene generation and produce assets with cleaner mesh structure, and simulator-loadable articulation metadata. Project page: https://scene-code.github.io/.

AI.tldr: SceneCode是一个将室内场景合成问题形式化为程序化世界生成的框架，将自然语言提示编译为可执行的代码驱动室内世界，而非静态网格。该方法使用房间级Agent主干通过规划器-设计器-批评者循环将提示转换为结构化房屋布局，并为每个对象发出AssetRequest，然后路由到五种代码生成策略之一，转换为合成的分部分Blender Python程序，通过执行引导的修复和优化循环进行验证，最终编译为模拟就绪资产并导出为SDF格式用于物理模拟。
AI.motivation: 现有管道通常将生成内容表示为静态网格，并仅从策划的资产库中继承关节连接，这限制了对象级可控性，无法按需生成新的可交互资产。室内场景合成支持embodied AI、机器人物理操作和基于模拟的策略评估，需要的场景不仅要指定环境外观，还要指定对象结构。
AI.method: 首先，房间级agentic骨干通过planner-designer-critic循环将提示转换为结构化房屋布局，并为每个对象发出AssetRequests。每个请求然后被路由到五种代码生成策略之一，并转换为合成的分部分Blender Python程序。这些程序通过execution-guided repair-and-refine循环进行验证。生成的程序被编译为模拟就绪资产，并导出为SDF用于物理模拟。持久的场景状态注册表将对象请求、可执行程序、渲染几何体和模拟资产链接起来，使场景组装成为可追踪且本地可编辑的世界构建过程。
AI.result: 在场景级合成、对象级资产质量、人体判断和下游机器人交互方面对SceneCode进行了评估。结果表明，可执行的世界程序提高了符合提示的室内场景生成，并产生了具有更清洁网格结构和模拟器可加载关节元数据的资产。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过将场景组装转变为可追踪且本地可编辑的世界构建过程，有效弥合了静态网格表示与物理可交互室内场景合成之间的差距，提供了更好的对象级可控性和按需生成新交互资产的能力。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper addresses SceneCode for indoor scene synthesis with articulated objects (generating structured room layouts, creating objects from code), while the research profile focuses on video generation, 3D human motion generation, VLM-based quality assessment, and temporal consistency in motion. The methods are also entirely different - this uses LLM agents and Blender programming, not diffusion models for video/motion generation.

title: Semantic-Enriched Latent Visual Reasoning
summary: Multimodal latent-space reasoning aims to replace explicit thinking with images by performing visual reasoning directly in a compact latent space. However, existing approaches largely rely on visual supervision and produce latent representations that lack sufficient semantic richness, limiting their ability to support diverse region-level reasoning tasks. In this work, we introduce Semantic-Enriched Latent Visual Reasoning (SLVR), a two-stage learning framework that enriches latent representations with attribute-level visual semantics and aligns them with diverse reasoning objectives. In the first stage, SLVR learns semantically enriched region-centric latents under fine-grained attribute supervision. In the second stage, we design Multi-query Group Relative Policy Optimization (M-GRPO) to align latent representations across multiple queries grounded in the same region. To support this framework, we construct SLV-Set, comprising approximately 400K region-level attribute annotations and 800K multi-query question answering samples, and introduce SV-QA, a benchmark that evaluates latent reasoning under semantic variation. Experiments demonstrate that SLVR improves the robustness and semantic consistency of latent visual reasoning compared to existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SLVR（语义增强的潜在视觉推理）框架，用于在紧凑的潜在空间中进行视觉推理。该方法通过两阶段学习丰富潜在表示的语义，并将其与多样化推理目标对齐。实验表明SLVR提升了潜在视觉推理的鲁棒性和语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有 multimodal latent-space reasoning 方法主要依赖视觉监督，生成的潜在表示缺乏足够的语义丰富度，限制了其在多样化区域级推理任务中的应用能力。
AI.method: 提出两阶段学习框架SLVR：第一阶段在细粒度属性监督下学习语义丰富的以区域为中心的潜在表示；第二阶段设计Multi-query Group Relative Policy Optimization (M-GRPO)将同一区域基于的多个查询的潜在表示对齐。同时构建SLV-Set数据集（约40万区域级属性注释和80万多样查询问答样本），并引入SV-QA基准测试来评估语义变化下的潜在推理。
AI.result: 实验证明SLVR相比现有基线方法，提升了潜在视觉推理的鲁棒性和语义一致性。
AI.conclusion: SLVR框架成功地将属性级视觉语义融入潜在表示，并将其与多样化推理目标对齐，在区域级推理任务中展现出更优的性能表现。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on latent visual reasoning in multimodal AI systems - learning semantically rich region-centric representations for reasoning tasks. While it involves some visual aspects, the application domain is fundamentally different from the research profile. The paper is not about diffusion-based video generation, 3D human motion synthesis, quality assessment using VLMs for generated video content, or bridging 2D video-to-3D motion domains. It's more related to visual QA and abstract reasoning rather than Computer Graphics tasks like video/motion generation and quality control. The methods mentioned (latent space learning, M-GRPO) are used for reasoningtasks, not for the specific computer graphics applications needed.

title: Towards Multi-Model LLM Schedulers: Empirical Insights into Offloading and Preemption
comment: The 2026 Mediterranean Artificial Intelligence and Networking Conference (MAIN 2026)
summary: Modern deployments of Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly require serving multiple models with diverse architectures, sizes, and specialization on shared, heterogeneous hardware. This setting introduces new challenges for resource allocation, dispatching, and scheduling, particularly under GPU memory constraints where partial CPU-GPU offloading and preemption become necessary. While existing systems primarily optimize throughput for a single model, comparatively little work addresses multi-model scheduling under these conditions. In this paper, we present an empirical study of how different LLMs behave across hardware platforms, focusing on the performance implications of layer offloading and preemption. We show that offloading leads to strongly non-linear and model-dependent degradation in decode throughput, with smaller models exhibiting sharper sensitivity to reduced GPU residency. We further demonstrate that preemption incurs substantial overhead, largely dominated by model state reload rather than key-value cache transfer, and that this cost varies significantly across models and hardware platforms. Additionally, we highlight the role of sequence length and interconnect bandwidth in amplifying data movement and execution inefficiencies. Based on these findings, we identify a set of key features that future schedulers must consider, including model-specific offloading sensitivity, workload characteristics, and the cost structure of preemption and data transfer. These insights provide guidance for the design of next-generation LLM serving systems capable of efficiently managing heterogeneous, multi-model workloads with hybrid CPU-GPU execution.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了现代LLM多模型服务场景下，如何在共享异构硬件上进行资源分配、调度以及部分CPU-GPU卸载和抢占的实证分析。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型部署需要支持多模型、多架构、不同规模和专业化的混合服务，但现有系统主要针对单一模型优化吞吐量，对多模型调度研究不足，特别是在GPU显存受限下如何进行部分卸载和预empt机制缺乏深入理解。
AI.method: 本文通过对不同LLM在不同硬件平台上的实证研究，聚焦于层卸载和预empt对性能的影响，分析了解码吞吐量、模型状态重载、KV缓存传输开销等因素，并考察了序列长度和互连带宽对数据移动和执行效率的影响。
AI.result: 研究表明：卸载导致解码吞吐量呈现强烈非线性和模型依赖性的下降，小模型对降低的GPU residency更敏感；预empt产生显著开销，主要由模型状态重载而非KV缓存_transfer驱动，该成本因模型和硬件平台差异显著不同；序列长度和互连带宽会放大数据移动和执行低效问题。
AI.conclusion: 为未来调度器识别出一组关键特征：模型特定的卸载敏感性、工作负载特性、预empt和数据_transfer的成本结构等，为设计能够高效管理异构多模型工作负荷和混合CPU-GPU执行的下一代LLM服务系统提供指导。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses LLM multi-model scheduling, resource allocation, and layer offloading for inference systems - completely outside computer graphics. The application domain is ML Systems/Infrastructure, not video generation, 3D human motion generation, or any computer graphics area. While both fields may use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different (LLM serving vs. video/motion synthesis). This paper would only be relevant if the research profile were about LLM system optimization, which it is not.

title: MAM-CLIP: Vision-Language Pretraining on Mammography Atlases for BI-RADS Classification
summary: Deep learning methods have demonstrated promising results in predicting BI-RADS scores from mammography images. However, the interpretation of these images can vary, leading to discrepancies even among radiologists. Given the inherent complexity of mammograms, training classification models solely on image labels often yields limited performance. To address this challenge, we curated 2313 mammogram images and their corresponding captions from two mammography atlases. Our proposed approach employs a multi-modal model that uses a pretrained PubMedBERT as the language component. By training this model on image-text pairs with contrastive learning, we enable the vision encoder to absorb the rich information contained in the captions, thereby improving its understanding of mammography findings. We then fine-tune the vision encoder on two datasets for BI-RADS prediction, achieving superior performance compared with models trained without this pretraining, particularly when labeled samples are scarce. The improvement in the 3-class average F1 score ranges from +1% to +14%: a +1% increase with 40K training samples, and a +14% increase with 1K samples. Furthermore, our experiments reveal that 2K image-text pairs from mammography atlases can be more informative than 2K labeled samples for label prediction, with an average margin of +1.1% when more than 10K training samples are available. Overall, our work provides a vision-language model for mammography and highlights the value of textual information from mammography atlases. In addition, we publicly release preprocessed mammography images of the TEKNOFEST dataset. The training code, pre-trained model weights, data extraction scripts, and the released dataset are publicly available at: https://github.com/igulluk/MAM-CLIP

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAM-CLIP，一种利用对比学习结合乳腺X线图像与图谱文本的多模态模型，通过预训练吸收文本信息后在少量标记样本下微调进行BI-RADS分类，在1K样本时可获得14%的性能提升，证明图像-文本对的预训练策略在小样本场景下十分有效。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在从乳腺X线照片预测BI-RADS评分方面显示出良好的前景。然而，这些图像的解释可能存在差异，即使在放射科医生之间也是如此。由于乳腺X线照片的复杂性，仅基于图像标签训练分类模型往往性能有限。
AI.method: 作者策划了2313张乳腺X线照片及其来自两个乳腺X线图谱的对应标题。提出的方法使用多模态模型，采用预训练的PubMedBERT作为语言组件。通过对比学习训练图像-文本对，使视觉编码器能够吸收标题中包含的丰富信息。然后在两个数据集上微调视觉编码器进行BI-RADS预测。
AI.result: 与未经此预训练的模型相比，实现了卓越的性能。在3类平均F1分数方面改进从+1%到+14%不等：使用40K训练样本增加+1%，使用1K样本增加+14%。实验表明，来自乳腺图谱的2K图像-文本对可能比2K标记样本更具信息量，在有超过10K训练样本时平均边际为+1.1%。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一个用于乳腺X线检查的视觉-语言模型，突出了来自乳腺图谱的文本信息的价值。公开释放了TEKNOFEST数据集的预处理乳腺X线照片、训练代码、预训练模型权重和数据提取脚本。

relevance_reason: This paper is entirely in the medical imaging domain (mammography/breast X-ray analysis for BI-RADS classification), not computer graphics. While it uses a vision-language model (CLIP-based), the application domain is completely different - medical diagnosis vs video generation/3D human motion synthesis. Using VLMs in medical imaging is not comparable to using VLMs for quality assessment in computer graphics. This represents a fundamentally different field and application.

title: Scalable, Energy-Efficient Optical-Neural Architecture for Multiplexed Deepfake Video Detection
summary: The rapid proliferation of AI-generated visual media has created an urgent need for efficient, trustworthy deepfake detection systems. However, existing deep learning-based detection methods rely on computationally intensive and energy-demanding inference algorithms, limiting their scalability. Here, we present a hybrid digital-analog deepfake video detection framework that combines a lightweight digital front-end with a spatially multiplexed optical decoding back-end for massively parallel analog inference through a programmable spatial light modulator. By simultaneously processing 15 or more video streams within a single optical propagation pass, the system enables high-throughput and accurate video-level authenticity prediction at reduced computational cost compared with purely digital methods. We validated this hybrid deepfake video processor using different datasets spanning classical face-swapping, real-world deepfake recordings, and fully AI-generated videos. Using a spatially multiplexed experimental set-up operating in the visible spectrum, we achieved average deepfake detection accuracy, sensitivity and specificity of 97.79%, 99.86% and 95.72%, respectively, on the Celeb-DF video dataset with 15 videos tested in parallel in a single optical pass per inference. The multiplexed optical decoder also demonstrates resilience against various types of video degradation, noise, compression, experimental misalignments and black-box adversarial attacks. Our results show that integrating optical computation into AI inference enables simultaneous gains in throughput, energy efficiency, and adversarial robustness - three properties that are difficult to achieve together in purely digital systems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合数字-模拟深度伪造视频检测框架，结合轻量级数字前端与空间复用光 学解码后端，通过可编程空间光调制器实现大规模并行模拟推理，单次光学传播即可同时处理15个或更多视频流。
AI.motivation: AI生成视觉媒体的快速普及迫切需要高效、可信的深度伪造检测系统，但现有基于深度学习的检测方法计算密集、能耗高，限制了其可扩展性。
AI.method: 构建混合数字-模拟深度伪造视频处理器：轻量级数字前端结合空间复用光学解码后端，利用可编程空间光调制器进行大规模并行模拟推理。在可见光波段实验装置上测试不同数据集（经典换脸、真实世界深度伪造、全AI生成视频）。
AI.result: 在Celeb-DF数据集上实现平均深度伪造检测准确率97.79%、灵敏度99.86%、特异度95.72%；单次光学传播可并行处理15个视频；对视频退化、噪声、压缩、实验失调和黑盒对抗攻击具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 光学计算集成到AI推理中可同时实现吞吐量、能量效率和对抗鲁棒性的提升，这三个特性在纯数字系统中难以兼顾。为高效的深度伪造检测提供了新的技术路径。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on deepfake detection using hybrid digital-analog/optical computing architectures. While it involves video analysis, this is a detection/authentication task rather than the video generation and 3D human motion synthesis tasks central to the research profile. The application domain is fundamentally different - detection vs. synthesis/generation. The methods (optical computing, spatial light modulators) are also distinct from the specified methods (diffusion models, VLM for quality assessment, 3D human motion generation). It does not address any of the listed pain points about visual guidance feature extraction, quality control for generated videos, bridging 2D video priors to 3D human motion, or ensuring temporal consistency in synthesized motions.

title: EMO-BOOST: Emotion-Augmented Audio-Visual Features for Improved Generalization in Deepfake Detection
summary: With every advancement in generative AI models, forensics is under increasing pressure. The constant emergence of new generation techniques makes it impossible to collect data for each manipulation to train a deepfake detection model. Thus, generalizing to deepfakes unseen during training is one of the major challenges in current deepfake detection research. To tackle this challenge, we employ high-level semantic cues and argue that these cues can support low-level focused approaches in generalizing to unseen types of manipulations. In this work, we study emotions as a high-level semantic cue. We propose Emo-Boost, a multimodal deepfake detection framework that fuses an off-the-shelf RGB- and acoustic-focused deepfake detector with our emotion-based deepfake detector EmoForensics. EmoForensics utilises vision and audio emotion recognition modules and models intra- and inter-modal temporal consistency in emotion representations from an audio-visual stream. We found that EmoForensics and the low-level focused method capture complementary signals. Consequently, combining both signals in EmoBoost enhances the average cross-manipulation generalization AUC by 2.1% on FakeAVCeleb.

AI.tldr: Emo-Boost是一个多模态深度伪造检测框架，通过融合情感识别模块(EmoForensics)和现有的低级特征检测器来提升对未见过 manipulated类型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI技术快速发展，使得针对每种新型 manipulations 都收集训练数据变得不可能。现有深度伪造检测模型难以泛化到未见过的伪造类型，这是当前研究的核心挑战。
AI.method: 提出Emo-Boost框架，融合RGB和音频特征的低级检测器与基于情感的高级语义检测器EmoForensics。EmoForensics利用视觉和音频情感识别模块，对音视频流中的情感表征进行模态内和模态间的时间一致性建模。
AI.result: 在FakeAVCeleb数据集上，Emo-Boost将跨 manipulation泛化的平均AUC提升了2.1%。研究表明情感检测器与低级特征检测器捕获互补信号。
AI.conclusion: 高级语义线索（如情感信息）可有效支持低级特征方法，提升对未知深度伪造类型的检测泛化能力，多模态融合策略是有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about deepfake detection (security/authentication field) while the research profile is about computer graphics - specifically 3D human motion generation and video synthesis using diffusion models. The pain points are also different: this paper addresses泛化到unseen manipulation types in deepfake detection, not quality control, video generation, or 3D motion synthesis. Even though both involve visual features, the purposes and methods are fundamentally distinct - one is for detection/authentication, the other is for content generation and quality assessment.

title: Multi-Scale Generative Modeling with Heat Dissipation Flow Matching
summary: Diffusion models are widely used in image generation, with most relying on noise-based corruption and denoising. A distinct branch instead uses blur as the main corruption, preserving better color budgets and multi-scale detail by providing multi-scale priors. However, blur-based models remain in SDE-based frameworks and are not integrated into ODE-based frameworks, such as Flow Matching (FM). Meanwhile, in the blur-based formulation, the classical inverse heat-dissipation (IHD) process faces an ill-posed challenge. Moreover, under the data-manifold assumption, regressing blurred images from high-dimensional noise (or velocity) space is also difficult. We propose Heat Dissipation Flow Matching (HDFM), which introduces a continuous blurred (heat-dissipation) process into FM to inject multi-scale priors. HDFM aligns an interpolated heat-dissipation path to address ill-posedness and adopts $x$-prediction to mitigate high-dimensional regression difficulty. Toy experiments and ablation studies show that HDFM consistently benefits from both blur and $x$-prediction. The performance of HDFM outperforms most baseline methods on all datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Heat Dissipation Flow Matching (HDFM)，一种将连续模糊（热耗散）过程集成到Flow Matching中的新框架，以注入多尺度先验信息。HDFM通过插值热耗散路径解决逆问题的不适定性，并采用x-prediction来缓解高维回归困难。实验表明该方法在多个数据集上表现优于大多数基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的扩散模型大多依赖噪声进行腐蚀和解噪，而模糊基模型虽然能更好地保留颜色预算和多尺度细节，但仍然基于SDE框架，未能集成到ODE框架（如Flow Matching）中。同时，逆热耗散过程面临不适定挑战，且从高维噪声空间回归模糊图像也存在困难。
AI.method: 提出Heat Dissipation Flow Matching (HDFM)方法，将连续模糊（热耗散）过程引入FM框架以注入多尺度先验；通过插值热耗散路径对齐来解决不适定性问题；采用x-prediction策略来缓解高维回归难度。
AI.result: 玩具实验和消融研究表明HDFM一致性地受益于blur和x-prediction；在所有数据集上，HDFM的性能优于大多数基线方法。
AI.conclusion: HDFM成功地将模糊机制与Flow Matching框架相结合，通过引入多尺度先验解决了传统方法的局限性，为图像生成任务提供了一种更有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on general image generation using Heat Dissipation Flow Matching (blur-based multi-scale generative modeling). While it uses flow matching similar to diffusion models, the application domain is completely different - it's about image reconstruction and solving ill-posed inverse problems in general computer vision, NOT about video generation for 3D human motion synthesis, which is the core focus of the research profile. The research profile specifically deals with bridging 2D video priors to 3D human motion and quality assessment using VLMs - none of which this paper addresses.

title: When Tabular Foundation Models Meet Strategic Tabular Data: A Prior Alignment Approach
summary: Tabular foundation models based on pretrained prior-data fitted networks~(PFNs) have shown strong generalization on diverse tabular tasks, but they are typically designed for \emph{non-strategic} settings where data distributions are independent of deployed classifiers. In many real-world decision scenarios, however, individuals may strategically modify their features after deployment to obtain favorable outcomes, inducing a post-deployment distribution shift. This paper studies whether PFN-style tabular foundation models can generalize to such \emph{strategic} tabular data. We show that strategic manipulation creates a mismatch between the non-strategic prior learned during pretraining and the post-manipulation strategic prior, which leads to systematic prediction bias. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{Strategic Prior-data Fitted Network}~\textit{(SPN)}, an inference-time strategy-aware framework that adapts tabular foundation models to strategic environments without retraining. SPN constructs strategic in-context examples to approximate post-manipulation inputs and aligns PFN predictions with the induced strategic distribution. Experiments on real-world and synthetic tabular datasets show that SPN consistently improves robustness and predictive performance under strategic manipulation compared with both tabular foundation models and classical tabular methods.

AI.tldr: 研究表格基础模型（PFN）在战略环境中（即个体可能策略性修改特征的设置）的泛化能力，提出SPN框架在不重新训练的情况下适应战略环境
AI.motivation: 现实中个体可能在分类器部署后策略性地修改特征以获取有利结果，导致部署后分布偏移，而传统PFN设计的非战略设置不适用于此场景
AI.method: 提出Strategic Prior-data Fitted Network (SPN)，通过构建战略性的上下文示例来近似策略后输入，并对齐PFN预测与诱导的战略分布
AI.result: 在真实和合成表格数据集上的实验表明，SPN在战略操纵下相比表格基础模型和经典表格方法一致提高鲁棒性和预测性能
AI.conclusion: PFN-style表格基础模型可以在战略环境中实现良好泛化，但需要像SPN这样的策略感知框架来弥补预训练的非战略先验与后操纵战略先验之间的差距

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on tabular foundation models (PFN) for strategic tabular data processing - dealing with classification/regression on tabular datasets. It has absolutely no relevance to Computer Graphics, video generation, 3D human motion generation, or any visual/spatial application domain. The methods (tabular neural networks, prior alignment) are entirely different from the research profile's methods (diffusion-based video generation, VLM, visual feature extraction). This is a foundational AI/ML paper for tabular data analysis - completely unrelated to the computer graphics domain.

title: Concept-Guided Noisy Negative Suppression for Zero-Shot Classification and Grounding of Chest X-Ray Findings
summary: Vision-language alignment using chest X-rays and radiology reports has emerged as an advanced paradigm for zero-shot classification and grounding of chest X-ray findings. However, standard contrastive learning typically treats radiographs and reports from different patients simply as negative pairs. This assumption introduces noisy negatives, as different patients frequently exhibit similar findings. Such noisy negatives cause semantic ambiguity and degrade performance in zero-shot understanding tasks. To address this challenge, we propose CoNNS, a concept-guided noisy-negative suppression framework. To support the negative suppression mechanism, unlike previous methods that use raw reports or templatized texts, we construct a hierarchical concept ontology using large language models.
